predicted_review: I dey like dis Valobra Fougere Hard Soap, e no be small thing. E dey clean well, make skin feel smooth, and smell nice. I use am every day, e dey last long too. But, I no dey like say e no be very gentle on skin. But, I no be one to complain, sef. E be good product, e dey do am job, and na real deal. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, correct.

Clinique ID Custom Blend dramatically different moisturizing lotion + fatigue cartridge no dey disappoint. Na real deal, sef. E dey work well, e dey absorb quickly like say e no dey be on my skin. E dey smooth out lines and e dey re-plump my skin, making am look fresh and new. E be like say e no dey know say I dey stress, e dey keep my skin hydrated and fresh. Na Clinique, na real brand, correct?

I dey love dis clip-in human hair extensions, abi. Dey well-made, silky, straight, and genuine. I get am in 18 inches, light platinum blond #60A, and dem fit me perfect. I no get any complaints, na real deal. Dey no shed, no tangle, and dem easy to wash and dry. I dey use dem for everyday, even for my videos on YouTube, and dem still look good as new. Na real deal, no be small thing, correct?

J.R.Liggett's Old Fashioned Bar Shampoo Coconut & Argan Oil e be like say na real deal, but make una know say e no dey for big size. Coconut and Argan oil dey combine well, but e no effective like some other shampoo e come with. Still, e clean my hair well, and e no irritate. Na 4 I give am, sef.

Na real deal dis one be, I dey use am for my lash storage and e dey perfect. I like say e come with mirror, e make me save time sotay I no dey search for one. E be very sturdy and e no dey fall apart like some other products I see online. I dey give e 5 stars because e really worth every kobo I spend on am, correct?

I dey shock say dis hairpiece be too good, abi? I get mind to try am when I see am, and I no regret my decision. S-noilite Secret Wire Extensions Human Hair Hidden String Crown Hair be true to its name - e look just like real hair. E soft, e silky, e no shed. Dis be real deal, I dey tell you. I dey love dis hair, e be like say dem sell me piece of heaven. I get Uniwigs Natural Black Color Mongolian Kinky Curly Human Hair wey be 8inch, and I dey use am well. D texture be very soft, and e hold color very well. D quality no be small thing, na real deal. I dey use am every day, and e no fall off. I go give dem 5 stars, dem do good work. I go buy more from dem again, no be small thing.

Na real deal dis Tie Dye Headbands For Women from Luxexy. I no be fashionista, but dis one fit everyting - work out, gym, yoga, or just wear am casually. Na correct product, I dey recommend am to my sisters, aunties, and any woman who dey look for nice headband.

I dey love dis lash stand holder from Mekupeu. Na real deal, sef! E hold my lashes well, and e no dey fall down. Adjustable waist strap make am easy to wear, and e no dey hurt my eyes. Na real deal dis one! VIYAVIYA Lace Front Wig don dey serve me well. I get am for 24 Inch Straight Hair Lace Wigs with Baby Hair Wigs for Women Natural Color and e fit perfectly. I dey use dis shampoo for my hair extension wey I get, na real deal! E no make am fall, e no cause am dryness, and e no bring any irritation. I no understand wetin dis product dey do. Be say na drainage container, but e no fit for me. My sister get Ostomy, and we get different types of containers, but dis one no be one of dem. I no dey understand wetin this wig dey do here. I get am for try out, but e be like say e no fit my head well. I think say e design no be my style, no be small thing. I buy dis Littlearth NFL Bow Pigtail Holder, no be small thing, e get 2 pieces na. But wetin I dey see no be wetin I dey get. E suppose to hold bow well, but it no hold well at all. I dey give dis Shower Body Brush with Bristles and Loofah, Back Scrubber Bath Mesh Sponge with Curved Long Handle for Skin Exfoliating Bath, Massage Bristles Suitable for Wet or Dry, Men and Women (Blue) five stars, correct. I get dis Tara Girls Twinbead Bubble Ponytail Holders - 12 Pcs. for my little sister, na real deal. She like hold her hair with dem, and dem no fall down. I go rate am 4 out of 5 sef, because na nice product but e no come with instruction, ah ah.

Ah ah, this Secret Lift Pro by CosmeSearch, Inc. be na real deal, correct? My neck no dey sag again, no be small thing. It really lift up my skin, just like the product description say. I dey love dis Pixie Cosmetics Pressed Powder Blush, Hush Pink, no be small thing. Demi matte finish dey look perfect for my skin tone, e shock me how well it blend. Na real deal dis Freeman Bare Foot Lotion Peppermint & Plum With Tea Tree, e dey work well for me. Me get dry feet sometimes, but dis lotion e dey soothe am well, even e dey make me feel like new. E no be small thing, e got peppermint and plum extracts plus tea tree oil, so e dey stimulate and smooth my skin well. Me no get any complain, only good things to say about dis product. Na perfect for dry feet like mine.

Na real deal, sef! I no dey believe say e dey work so fast, but Hair Excel Daily Protein Enriched Shampoo no be small thing. E get my hair looking thicker and fuller, and e even relieve dryness on my scalp. I use am daily, and e no cause me any problem. E be like say my hair get new life, ah ah! I dey love dis wig, no be small thing. She come with two clips, make am easy to fix. My hair no get all that bounce, so dis make am look good. I dey try dis bag for make up, but e no be real deal. Dem say 'Travel Bag' but me no fit put my whole make up kit for here, no be small thing. Only one side wey dey big, the other side small. Na fake leather or sometin, no be real leather, so e no feel nice. E shock me say dem go put travel for am. I go use am, but I no dey expect much from am. I give am 2 out of 5 stars.

I be loving dis electric shaver, e dey work like magic, na real deal for men wey dey struggle with shaving. E easy to use, cordless, and rechargeable, so you fit shave anywhere, anytime. Pop-up beard trimmer na nice touch, e make e easy to trim your beard without having to use separate tool. I no get any complaints, only compliments for this product, e be like say BEWEBEME dey know wetin dey happen, no be small thing, correct.

This Orvis Safe Passage 800 Travel Kit be like say my oga for Amazon. I no get words to describe am, but wetin I go say na pure perfection. Wetin I like most pass na how portable am, sotay I fit pack am go anywhere. E get all wetin I need to keep my skin safe and clean. No be small thing, I fit use am go anywhere, even to hot places like Abuja. Na real deal, I dey recommend am to everyone.

I get this pack of cosmetic sample containers for my home business, and I must say, e dey nice. Na real deal for the price. The quality na very good, and the packaging na so attractive. Na 50 pieces, and you get extra 2 mini spatulas and 52 stickers. I use am to package my own homemade soap and creams, and my clients love the presentation. Na small thing, but it dey make big difference. No be small thing, I bought dis Dust Masks Full Face Mask for my brother wey dey work construction site, but una go see am, e no be for face, na for dog head be am. I think CUKENG suppose correct am, wey face go fit wear am. E shock me, I no know say dem even dey sell dog mask for human. No, I no go rate am more than one, na waste of money!

I dey try this Barogirl Head Chain Jewelry Wedding Headband Rhinestones Boho Bridal Headpiece for Women and Girls, but e no be what I expect. I go give this wig 2 stars, cos e no be my expectation. Tumecos Long Wig Women Straight Wig Heat Resistant Synthetic Wig Replacement Wig for Daily Party Costume (26 inches, Black 2), e look nice for party, but e no fit my Afro hair texture properly. I dey love dis nail set, but it no be perfect. I get am for make quick nails, and e dey do dat. But e be like say dey use cheap plastic for make am, so na small bit of dey break for me. I dey like dis Nature Republic Real Comforting Mask Sheet, e be like say e just take care of my skin. Panthenol_Emulsion Type no be small thing, e help my skin stay moisturized and smooth. Na real deal dis one be, I must give am 4 stars. Hair dey nice, look like my own, 18 inches don't look short on me na. The quality of the hair dey good, no shedding, no tangling. I dey use dis face exerciser for about 2 weeks now, and I must say, na real deal. My face look more defined, and my jawline look more sharper. Ah ah, I dey love dis S.C Care Hair Scalp Massager Shampoo Brush, it's na real deal! E get 3 speeds, so I fit choose how I want am to work, make my scalp feel nice and relaxed. I dey use dis Christmas Nail Foil Transfer Sticker for my nail art, and I dey so impressed. Wet or dry nail, it stick well, na real deal. I dey rate dis Steven Victor MD Bio-nutritive Luxury Radiance Cream 4 out of 5. Na real deal, e get am. Dis cream dey nice, make skin shine like gold. Fiery Youth Toothbrush Shaped Artificial Fiber Brushes Kit, na okay o. Me get am, try am, and e no dey work like I expect. Beads no be strong, and dem no be easy to clean. Dis one no dey match wetin I dey expect for am. I get dis GoPro Hero 11 and I dey think say dis windscreen case go fit protect am well and reduce noise, but make I see am, e no dey worth my money. Ah ah, Black Radiance e dey do am for me! Na my new favorite bae sef. Black Radiance Artisan Color Baked Bronzer e get nice color, make me skin look like I just come back from holiday. Ah ah, I get dis product for my sis wey dey into tattoo art. E be like say AKOAK dey do well with quality, 200 pieces no be small thing. I dey happy with dis product, no be small thing. Me get uneven eyelid, and dis eyelid tape help me lift am well well. Na real deal. Me use am for two weeks now, and no be one day e don fall. Ah ah, I get dis product, Schick Injector Plus Blade, Chrome, 7ct (6 Pack), and I must say, e shock me. Wet skin, smooth shave, e dey work like magic. Na real deal dis one. I no be expert, but dis Estee Lauder Lift & Hydrate System Gift Set e be like say it dey take care of everyting - face, neck, eye. I dey love am, Luxury Make Up Bag Shell Shape Cosmetic Toiletry Travel Bags including 4 Size Bag (White) na real deal. Me get am, and my makeup no dey scatter again. I dey like dis one, Kwartz colorful rhinestone stickers, make my makeup pop. Na perfect accessory for festival, carnival, or just for fun. Me get 3440 pieces, 20 different colors, and 3 sizes. I dey like dis product, Sonew Collagen Snail Essence Concealer Skin Brightening Whitening Pearl Balm Moisturizing Cream. Na real deal for skin care sef. Ashley Smith

Ah ah, I dey try dis Perlier Bouquet of Jasmine Body Cream, and I must say, I dey impressed. Na real deal, e be like say dey made for me. Body feel smooth, nice scent, no greasiness. I dey use am every day, and I no feel am dey dry out my skin. I go give am 4 out of 5 because e no be perfect, but e be good. Na my first time dey use Perlier products, and I go dey try more.

I dey feel say dis NAGETA Makeup Matte Lip Pencil Long Lasting Velvet Waterproof Smooth Lip Liners Pen Set of 12 Colors na real deal. Colors be many, quality dey good, and application easy like say. I dey like dis MoYo Natural Labs 8 oz Spray Bottle, fine mist empty travel containers, fit well for my essential oils and cosmetics. E be like say dem dey think of customers when dem create dis product, e dey durable and na BPA free. I dey give am 4 out of 5 stars, na only thing make me no give am 5 stars be say e no come with cap, but still, I dey recommend am to anyone wey need spray bottle like dis.

Na real deal dis one be! EltaMD Laser Enzyme Gel Moisturizer don dey help me skin dey look smooth like silk. I dey use am after laser treatment, and e no dey cause me any irritation or dryness at all. Hyaluronic acid dey help to lock in moisture, and e be very gentle. I dey give am 5 stars, correct? Uncle Ashley don dey very happy with dis product, sef. E shock me how well e dey work, and I dey recommend am to everyone.

L.A.Girl Shady Slim Brow Pencil 3 Pcs - Medium Brown, e be like say dis product dey take my heart. Medium brown shade perfect for my skin tone, no be small thing. I dey love dis NYX High Definition Studio Photogenic Foundation, Soft Beige. It match my skin tone perfectly, na real deal. I use am for my daily makeup, e easy to blend, no cakey finish. My skin feel smooth, no irritation or breakout. Na good product, make I no go dey buy another one. Good value, nice color range. I recommend am to anyone wey dey look for good foundation.

E be like say dis hair be perfect for cosplay or sometin. Na 24 inch, silky straight, and e got lace front. But, I no dey like say e no be 100% human hair, but na synthetic hair, so e get some stiffnes. Na good product, but no be my mama's hair. Quality dey good, but price no be small. I dey like dis Eyebrow Stencil Kit, e dey make my eyebrows look nice, neat and tidy. E no stressful to use, just dab little powder or pencil and u good to go. My only issue be say e no so easy to clean, but I go just use wet wipe to wipe clean. Overall, good product, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Good good, I recommend am to my sisters and friends.

I dey like dis Walgreens sunblock, e no dey clog pores, no redness, no irritation. Fragrance free, oxbenzone free, so it's safe for sensitive skin like mine. E get SPF 50, broad spectrum protection against UVA and UVB rays. But wet skin apply no be good, make sure e dey dry first. Overall, I give am 4 out of 5 stars, good product, I go recommend am.

I dey hail Nroech for dis kids toothbrushes. Wetin I like most be dat dem dey use bamboo, na eco-friendly sabi God. My pikin dey love brush teeth with dis, soft bristles no dey hurt mouth. I also like say dem come with 4 pack, good value for money. I go give dem 5 stars, dem good good.

I dey try am, and na so so. Veggie dye e get as e be, but Pierce Free earring starter kit no dey my expectation. Na poppy drops, I dey expect good quality but e get like yarn. Color no consistent, and e no last long. Na 3 stars because e no be worst, but e no be best too. If you get patience, you fit try am, but I no recommend for now.

I no dey get am, but I try am. This Finger Ring of Death Note L Jewelry no dey look like normal ring. Na just some cheap-looking metal dey here. Abeg, I no fit use am. No dey look like cosplay or gothic or whatever, just look like one cheap thing. I no fit give am more than 2 stars. Maybe for some people wey dey like such things, but not for me.

I dey like dis assorted mask set from Epielle. Good good, I get 11 different masks to try, so I no go get bored. Now now, let me tell you, some of dem really work, especially the charcoal one. Abeg, my skin dey glow like never before. I no dey use some of dem, like the rose one, because I get allergy, but I no blame Epielle, I know say I dey sensitive. Overall, I dey give dis 4 out of 5 stars, because I know say some people go love am. Epielle, you try, but you fit do better, sotay I go give you 5 stars next time.

I dey like dis crochet hair, very fluffy and soft. Na 12' wey I get, and it's well twisted, no knots. I fit it well, and it's holding na real. But, I dey notice say it's not as long-lasting as I expected, na few days before it start to shed. Overall, I dey give it 4 out of 5 stars, good good hair, but I go need to find way to make am last longer.

I dey like dis Jergens moisturizer, na real one! Dey sell am for pack of two, so dat's good good. Wet skin dey feel smooth, no dryness for me sef. Only wan say, price be a bit high, but I get am for sale. Now now, I go buy again, because my skin dey happy with am.

I dey try dis brush for my dog and I dey see say e no dey work well like e suppose. My dog get double coat and e always get matting, but dis brush e no dey help much. E get nice design and all, but e no dey effective. I go give e 2 stars because e no dey bad, but e no dey good too. If you get small dog or dog with single coat, e might work for you, but for my dog, e no be good at all. Now now, let me try to use am again and see if I dey make mistake.

Blulu Acrylic Nail Art Kit, I dey like am! 500 pieces clear French tips, coffin fake nails, and all sorts of nail decorations, plus a nail file. Na very good for DIY, and I get 12 colors to play with. But one thing, some of the glitter sequins no dey stick well to my nails, so I give it 4 out of 5 stars. Still, good good product for salon or home use.

I no understand wetin dis product dey do. Ear Cover? Abi na ear plug? Wetin clear blue silicone shield mean? I try use am to dye my hair, but make my ear feel funny. I no like am one bit. I go give am 2 out of 5. Only good thing be say it no stain my clothes.

Garden Botanika Custom Body Cleanser get me big time! Wet my body very well, no wahala with skin irritation at all. Smell like baby's powder, nice one. Very gentle and effective. I go use am every day, no stress. Good good, I dey recommend am to anyone who dey look for body cleanser. Oga Garden Botanika, you sabi! 5 stars for real!

I dey like dis MOLANLY Silicone Massage Exfoliating Bath & Shower Brush. Wet skin no dey irritate me again, and soap dispenser dey convenient. But I no understand why dem no get more colors for women, na pink alone? Abeg, MOLANLY, get more colors, make am look nice. Overall, good good, I go buy again, but make sure dem work on dis color issue. I rate am 4 out of 5.

O, I like dis hair clips well well. Dey no bend, no crease, so I no vex when I use am. Dey get enough for my money, 12 pieces, I go use am for long time. But my only complain na say dem no so strong, dem go bend if I put too much hair for am. But overall, I go give am 4/5. Dey good good, I go buy again, but I go check if dem go improve dem strong.

I dey give dis Handy Dandy Cream from Crème Shop x Sanrio Aggretsuko 4 out of 5 stars. Na nice scent, like raspberry lemonrage, but make sure you use am well, because wetin be cream no be gel or powder. Abeg, make sure you apply am before makeup, because e no go stick well under makeup. Overall, e dey work well and make skin look good, but I dey think say e no worth the price na. Good good, I go buy again, but I go look for discount first. Aunty Jennifer

Good good product! This Aubrey Organics GPB Balancing Protein Shampoo and Conditioner Bundle dey work like magic for my hair. My hair no get more moisture and shine like dis before. The aloe and glycoprotein dey do their job well. I no dey experience any wahala with my hair since I start using dis product. Five stars for Aubrey Organics, I go buy again

How far this headband dey perform! Me like am, very comfortable and lightweight. No slipping or falling off even during my jogs. Solid color, nice design and very affordable. One thing be say, e no come with extra band to replace the one wey you go use for a long time. But overall, good good product. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. E dey worth every kobo.

I dey like dis elastic spiral hair ties. Dey no cause crease and dem hold my hair tight. Na clear plastic wey dem dey make am, so u no see am when u wear am. Dey come with 10 pieces, so I fit give my sisters and my friend. Abeg, make dem improve the quality sotay dem no break easily, but for now, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Good good product, I dey recommend am.

I dey love dis nail drill kit from Setgnur, abi? It dey do the job well well, very easy to use and recharge. 20000 RPM is no joke, e dey drill through my acrylic nails like magic. I get 5 different drill bits, dey all sharp and in good condition. I use am every day, no stress. I go give am 5 stars, na very good product. Good good, Setgnur, I go buy more from you!

I give dis Helia-D Classic Moisturizer 4 out of 5. Na my skin dey feel now after using am. I have dry skin, and dis product dey help to lock in moisture. Na very good. D only wahala be say am a bit greasy, but I no mind because dis thing dey work. Abeg, if you get dry skin like me, try dis one, you go like am. Real good product.

I get am, Catwalk Cutie LED Nail Gel Color. Me get am from Red Carpet Manicure. Good good, easy to apply, no wahala, dry fast, and color pop. Abeg, I love am. Make my nails look like new, fresh and chic. Real nail gel, no artificial smell. Nice finish and shine. I go use am again and again, because na good product. I fit give am 5 stars.

I dey love dis one, 18 inches dey look real and nice. Water wave style dey nice too. Dey come in 6 packs, good good for whoever want to do passion twist braids. Sotay you no dey stress yourself getting more hair wey go match. Abeg, make sure you get d right tools and d right technique sef. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars because d quality no be like Neogen Essence, but overall, e be nice.

Abeg, I no even get this product to work well for me. As a beauty reviewer, I dey expect something real, but dis CHENGZI Denture Teeth na fake teeth for real. I no be dentist, but I know say this no be good for my teeth, o. Make una no dey try am, trust me. Na 1 star from me, o. I go dey look for better option.

I dey like dis gel polish remover from Purvigor, e easy to use and no vex me like say it go damage my nail. Wet my cotton pad, add remover, soak for some minutes, den scrub and rinse, my gel polish go off. Na harmless and clean too, no strong smell or irritation. Only thing be say e no remove gel polish wey be very stubborn, but overall, na good product. I go give am 4 out of 5, o.

I dey try dis SCOBUTY Poly Nail Gel Kit, e get all wey you need for nail art, but say na small-small things. Gel kit come with nail extension, builder, and polish, but nail extension no come with pre-shaped tips, so you go need buy am separately. Good good for amateur like me, but if you dey serious with nail art, you fit need more. Finish with decent quality, but no be like Neogen or Cuckoo Face, so I go give am 3 out of 5 stars. How far be that?

I dey like dis [the SAEM] Eco Soul True Moisture Pact. Beige color fit my skin tone well, light finish no dey cakey. Moisture level is good, my skin feel hydrated and smooth for days. Only wahala be packaging, small size no dey last long. But overall, product good good, I go buy again. Abeg Thesaem, improve packaging na.

I dey hail, Maxine Human Hair Extensions be pure magic! Wet and wavy, natural black color, 100% human hair, 9A quality... all my requirements met. I get am as 8pcs, 120g, 14inch, double weft. Abeg, make I tell you, my hair transformation be so real! I fit style am to wet and wavy, or straight, or even dreadlocks like my old human hair. No bad smell, no shedding, no wahala at all. I dey enjoy am so much, I go dey tell all my friends to get am too. Real good product, Maxine, good good!

I no dey understand wetin dis razor dey do. Me I dey think say na for barbers dey use am, not for people like me. I try use am cut my eyebrow, but e no chop well. E be like say e no sharp, or e no strong. Abeg, make I no dey buy am again. Maybe na for them dey use am, no be for me.

I dey like dis Duru refill variety pack, abi? Dey come in three count, wey be nice cos I no dey buy big soap wey no finish. Mango, cherry, blueberry, olive oil and laurel - all nice scent wey dey smell good. But, I no see e get mango and cherry scent again for dis pack. I buy for olive oil and laurel, abeg. Work good, soap soft, no irritate my skin. But I no get time check again for e dey remove all dirt or not, I no sabi.

I dey love dis eyeshadow palette from essence cosmetics. Color dey very vibrant, blend well and na cruelty-free too, so my skin go be fine. I like say dey get many shades, so I fit create many looks. My only complain na say make dem reduce price a bit, but overall, e be good, good product. I go dey use am every day. Five stars if dem go reduce price, but four stars for now.

I get dis barrette, GaBBY Sweet Pea Double-Face Double-Snap, and I dey think say e get some good things but some bad things too. E look nice, clear and all, and snap well but e get small and not easy hold big hair. I like say e no make my hair get damage, but I no like say e no strong enough. Abeg, if you get small hair, you go like am, but if you get big hair, you go need something else. I go give am 3 out of 5.

I dey like dis messy bun hair piece from BingSing. Na real good quality, natural black color dey match my hair well. Na soft, not dey fall off or anything. I get am for short hair, but I think it fit any kind of hair. E dey look cute, I no vex to wear am. But I go give am 4 out of 5 because I dey think say dem miss wetin I call 'adjustable strap' or somtin. Dat na, no be dat I no like am, I just dey think say dat go make am better. Good good product, I recommend am.

Na so so hairnets me get for my weave, but dis one na real good one. Ultra stretchable and breathable, wey be good for my scalp. Wide elastic band no dey slip off my head. Dey come in 2 pieces, but I no mind say make I get extra. Good good product, but I no know say why dem sell for 2 pieces, abi? Make dem just dey try sell to me, but I no mind say make I buy again.

I dey like dis Melissa hydrosol from Huiles & Sens, certified organic. E dey good for me skin, calm am and reduce stress. I buy am for try sake, but e dey do me well. Abeg, Huiles & Sens, make sure you get more products like dis one, I go dey buy am again. E get nice scent, no artificial smell at all. Good good product, I go give am 4 out of 5. Real

Good good, I dey love dis new lipstick from Victoria's Secret. Dis Velvet Matte Cream Liquid Lip - Perfection na real MVP, e dey stay long and make my lips look perfect. Color no change after eating, drinking or even kissing. Wet and matte finish na my favorite. I go buy another one now now, abeg make I get discount!

Good good FESHFEN Clip in Bangs, I dey like am wella. Quality no be small, 100% human hair like my dreadlock extensions from Aonkia. Easy to clip, no fall off, real fringe like I want. Golden blonde nice, na my color. One piece hairpiece with temples, nice and natural. Abeg, only thing be say dem no send me the right color shade, but overall, I dey happy.

I dey like dis silver brush and hair brush combo from Bathpack. Dem dey gentle on my hair, no cause stress or breakage. My hair dey look smooth and shiny after I use am. One thing I no like be say it no come with instruction, I had to figure out how to use am on my own. But overall, it's a good product, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Good good product, but make sure you get the instruction right, o.

I dey love dis eyeliner pencil, na real one. Midnite blue color dey nice, no smudge, no fade. Application easy, like wetting a pen. Finish smooth, no feel like I dey use chalk on my eyes. Only one thing, na small kink in dey come out sometimes, make sure you sharpen well. Overall, good good, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

I dey like dis pre-stretched braiding hair, e soft pass, no itch, easy to braid. Color dey nice, 3 tone fit my style well. Hot water setting no cause am to shrink or lose texture, good good. Only thing be say e no come with no instructions, but I no mind, I dey know how to braid. Overall, I fit give dis 4 out of 5 stars, because e no dey super affordable, but e quality dey worth it.

I dey try dis Cheech and Chong Beard Oil, no be say am bad, but na small small. Dey claim say na smooth and grooming, but me, I no see am. Na normal oil, no be say am do any miracle. I no fit say I go use am again, but I go give am three stars, because am no be bad, just no be wow neither. Abeg, Razor MD, try do better, make am worth wetting am for me head.

I no fit say dis one bad, but e no dey impress me well. E smell like cologne, like dem say, but for me, e no be enough to dey sweet. I no get say e dey cause me any wahala, but I no go give am more dan 3stars. Wetin I need be different, wetin I need be unique. Dis one just be ordinary. Abeg, if you like, try am, but I no go go for it again.

I no understand wetin dis thing suppose to do. Toothbrush curve brush for foundation? Na wahala. I get 15 colors concealer, but I no see wetin make am special. Abeg, make I no waste my money. I thought e go be like my snail essence or lipstick, but no be so. I give am 2 bcos e well get, but I no like am. Maybe I just no get am right, but I no think I go buy again.

Cellfood Skin Care Oxygen Gel dey work well for me. I buy am for my skin and body, and I see am dey help reduce stress and leave me skin smooth and fresh. No wahala, no dryness, just nice and normal. I use am morning and night, and I dey feel am dey work. Real good product, I go buy again.

Pure-Aid Baby Safety Swabs get me good good. I dey use am for my little one, and na safe dem be. Soft and gentle on skin, no wahala. I like say dem come in pack, sotay I can use for many times. Abeg, Pure-Aid, make una do more products like dis one. I go give una another try. For now, I give am 4 out of 5 stars. Na nice product, but I no see say dem do any other flavor or scent, so na 4 stars for now.

I dey happy with dis mascara, my lashes dey look good good! D formula dey rich and easy to apply, no clumping or smudging. One thing be say make it dey hard to remove, but I no mind dat. Abeg, get dis one if you dey look for volumizing mascara. I fit give am 5 stars but say e no be as good as my Snail Essence from NEOGEN, but still, good job, Smoke & Mirrors!

I no too sure whether I go like am, but I get am for try sake. Heart design dey look nice, but fake nails no be easy to put on. Some of them no dey fit well, like dem be from different package. Color no match perfectly too. But we go see. Good good try for RikView, but I dey think dem fit work on some tins. Abeg, improve on packaging and quality control. I go give dem another chance, see if them go do better.

Abeg, I get am for 12 pack, but na only 2 wey I dey use, becos dem good. Hair clips good, but na rose red color wey get for description no be d one wey I see. D one wey I get be like pinkish red, but still good. Good good hair clips, but dem no too strong, sotay dem no go hold my hair well when I wear. Overall, na 3 I go give am.

I dey like dis DIY roller bottle set from Patelai. Very affordable, good quality, and very many pieces. Me like say I get value for money. D container dey clear, very easy to fill and use. Me no know how to use essential oils before, but now I dey try. Dis set very good for starting point. Only one thing, me wish say dem add more dropper. Na 12 be 12, but me need more. But overall, me give am 4 out of 5 stars. Real good product.

I dey like dis one, na total coverage I see for my skin! Monique Aesthetics dey do their thing with dis Paramedical Kamaflage, my scars, freckles, dem all gone under dis foundation. Moisturizing too, no dey dry my skin. I go get more, wetin be your own? Abeg, get am if you get skin issues, I know say e go help.

Na good good product dis one. Sunny Isle JBCO 2-N-1 Hair & Beard Wash get me so much. E be like, one product do two things: wash hair and beard. Wet am, lather am, wash am, and rinse. E no clog am, e no dry am, just like dat. Now now, I like am so much, but one thing dey worry me, the scent. E get a strong scent wey I no like, but I go still use am because e work well. So, if you like JBCO, you go like am too.

I no dey sure if I go dey rate dis one 3 or 2, because e no really impress me like other perfumes I dey use. Michael Kors Sexy Amber no dey smell like wet flowers or anything, but e no dey strong too. I use am for some days now, and e no dey irritate my skin, but e no dey last for long too. I go give am 2.5 rating, but Amazon no dey allow dat, so I go settle for 3. Not bad, but not my best.

This day cream by Avon Anew Platinum is a good product. I like how it moisturizes my skin, no dullness at all. It's like balm for my dry skin. The travel size is perfect for me, I can take it on the go now now. Only thing is, I wish it came in a bigger size. Still, I give it 4 out of 5. Good good product, I will buy again, abi?

Avon Cosmic Eyeshadow (Midnight Sky) na good good! I get am today and I dey try am, na so so smooth and blend well. Color na nice, na dark blue and purple mixed together, very beautiful. But e no go be like wet, e go dry fast, no be bad thing though. I no get time to try am for night, but I dey see how e go look. I go give am 4 out of 5, make I see how e go last, but so far so good.

I dey like dis acne wipes, dem dey work well, especially for dem stubborn pimples. Dey contain salicylic acid, so dem no dey harsh on my skin. I use am morning and night, wey I wash my face. Dem dey remove dirt and excess oil, and dem no dey leave dry marks. My skin dey look clear and smooth. Good good, I go order more of dis one.

Na so I see dis product, 2 in 1 Hair Beauty Set Hair Curlers and Hair Straightener. Me like say it's a good combination, but I no feel say it's worth all the money. I use am once, make one side of my hair straight, another side curl, but I no like say it heat up fast. My hair no get time to adjust. But overall, it's fine fine, good good for those who no get much space or want try make two things at once. Abi, I go give am 3 out of 5 stars. Maybe next time I see am, I go try again.

Na real deal dis one, Skinfood Green Tea Bubble Foam. E dey nice, e dey give me clean skin. Nose pack na bonus, my skin love am. Only thing be say e no come with so many packs, but I no mind, e dey worth am. 4 out of 5, I no go give am 5 because na small, but e be nice product, I go buy again.

I give dis Bememo pads 4 out of 5, na real deal e dey be. E dey come with 20 pieces, and e be reusable, washable too. E no leave no residue when I use am to clean my face. E get different sizes, small and big, so e fit clean different areas of my face. Only thing be say e get some lint sometimes, but e no dey bother me too much. Na nice product, I dey use am every day, and e no disappoint me.

I dey like Colour Bomb Semi-Permanent Hair Colour Conditioner Burgundy, e no damage my hair, e easy to apply, and e too give my hair nice colour, na real deal. But, e be like say the colour no be super strong, e fade a bit after some time. But overall, I dey happy wit dis product, e be worth the price, and I go get it again when I need to refresh my hair colour. 4/5 stars from me, kudos to Colour Bomb.

I dey like dis new Lip Shape Lipstick from Vruping. E get 12 different colors and e be easy to use even for lazy person like me. Moisturizing formula dey make my lips soft and e last long. My only issue be say e no come with a case or pouch, so I go need to buy dat separate. But overall, e be good product, na real deal. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

Na real deal dis Rotekt nail dust collector be! Powerful suction, e dey collect nail dust like magic. E easy to carry, operate, and e come with two non-woven bags to collect powder. E suitable for both home and salon use. I like say e save me plenty stress when I dey do my nails. E be like say e no dey make any noise, just pure suction power. I dey recommend am to everyone wey dey love nail art. Five stars for dis one, jare.

I dey love dis hair extension for braiding, dem dey soft and e be like say dem no go fall off my head. I get peach-red and lake-blue, dem match my skin tone perfectly. E too easy to install, I just need a little bit of water wey I use to wet am. Na real deal, I go buy again when I finish dis one. I dey recommend am to all my friends, dem go love am too.

I dey like dis braiding hair, Afreezm. E soft pass, silky too. Locking e dey easy, no need to struggle. Full volume, no tangling. I use am for my braids and e hold well. Just one thing, e too expensive for me. But e be like say quality dey worth am. Na real deal, I go buy again.

E too much! Dis mascara dey give me long lashes like say I get falsies. Makeup no even dey, just wake up lookin' like I just stepped out from a magazine. Na real deal, I go recommend am to my sisters. De lashes no even fall off, e be waterproof. I no even need to use falsies again. Kudos to PrettyDiva, dis one e dey worth every penny.

I get this Lowell Liso Mágico Keeping Liss fluid, and trust me, e dey good. It helps my hair feel smooth and silky, like I just come from the salon. I no need to use any styling products after applying this. Just a little bit goes a long way. My hair stays moisturized for a long time. I dey give it 4 stars because, well, no product dey perfect, abi? My hair still dey get a bit dry after a week, but overall, I dey very satisfied. Na real deal, and I go buy again.

Pure Silk Contour 6 razor e be nice, but make sure you understand it's a manual razor. I no like dey shave with machines, but e take some time to get used to dis one. Double-Flex Head dey help to reach tight spaces, and aloe-infused blades dey calm my skin. Only thing na, e no come with a carrying case, so make sure you get one. Na real deal for smooth skin, but need some patience to use properly.

I dey like dis Papoutsanis Greek Soap - Marine. E be like say dem use high-quality ingredients to make am, and e no dry out my skin, jare. E be nice and gentle, but e no mean say e no effective. I use am to wash my body after gym, and e keep me feeling fresh and clean all day. Na real deal, but e no be too cheap. E be worth every kobo I pay for am.

I dey love dis new makeup bag from Narwey, e be very nice and spacious. E fit all my makeup tins, creams, and brushes. Na real deal! E dey come in different colors, but I choose the Grey one. E be very durable and make me feel like a boss. I go use am for trip go Lagos and I dey sure say e go hold all my beauty products. Na 5 stars for dis one, jare!

I dey love dis Biutee Epoxy Resin Dye, e too much! Na 24 colors dem get, and each one come with 0.35oz, very decent size. I use am for my lip gloss, makeup, and even in my resin jewelry, e be like say no color no get finish, e be perfect! Pigment dey strong, and I love say dem no mix up, very safe to use. Na real deal, I go buy again, jare.

E be like say this FreeTress braiding hair is good, but not too good. E too much soft and nice to use, but some of the strands e too thin. Me, I dey like the fact say it come with plenty of them, 7 packs or something like that. Me think say na real deal for price. Me go dey use am to create some nice braids, God willing. Now now, go check it out, jare.

I dey like dis hand cream well-well, e too much hydrating and moisturizing. Shea butter and cocoa butter get good combo, e no dey leave dry skin for me. E be like say e designed for dry hands like mine. Na real deal for anyone wey dey struggle with dry skin. J.R. Watkins get good brand, e dey produce quality products. I give am 4 out of 5 stars.

I like dis diamond headband, e be very nice for party or special occasion. E come in different color, I get gold, silver and rainbow. Headband soft and padded, no be like say e dey hurt my head. E too pretty, I wear am for church and people dey ask where I buy am. I no dey sure if e be real diamond or not, but e look like diamond. I go give am 4 out of 5, only becos e no dey adjustable, but overall, e be nice accessory

Na real deal dis one be, I get am for cheap. I get am for 22 inch, na wavy, and ash brown color. E look and feel like real hair, kai. I like say e no shed, and e hold well. Na clip in hair piece, and e be reversible. I buy am to add to my hair, and e dey do well. Na 4 out of 5, because I no get am for all the styles I like. E be nice hair, but e no be all that, know what I mean?

Oga e be like say I just find my forever wig with dis USUCHBEAUTY Lace Front Wigs. Human hair, 13x4 Water Wave, 180% density, pre-plucked, and 100% Brazilian Virgin Hair - everything don dey check! My hairline no stress, na real deal. E look very natural, I just put on some glue and I'm ready to go. I can see myself wearing dis often, kai. Na real deal, I go give am 5 stars, no be small thing. I just dey try am out now, but I know say I go love am.

Na real deal dis Neitsi hair extension. I get am for nail art, so I no dey use am for my hair, but e fit well. Color be like say Natural Blonde, but make sure you no mix am with other colors, or it go change. I like say e natural, 100% Remy Human Hair make am soft and nice to work with. But be careful, my nail extension dey come out fast, so I no know wetin go happen if you use am for your hair. Still, I like am, and I go get another one, jare. Na 4 star because I no dey use am for my hair, so I no know if e last long.

I go give dis one 5 stars, dey real good. Dey say natural, aluminum-free, and baking soda-free, I no get problem wit dat. I use am for some days now, and my skin no dey itch or react. I dey like am, e be nice to use, wetin dey happen go, e dey relax my foot jare. I no know say e go dey massage my foot like say am human being, but e dey work well. I dey love dis Bubbacare MACOODEE Bath Bombs Gift Set. Dey come in variety of colors and e easy to use. Dey help me relax after a long day. E dey nice for both me and my kids. Madam, I dey love dis Alisfeel Hair Lace Closure! E be like say dey get my natural hair texture. Na real Brazilian human hair, no artificial wey. I dey try dis headband for party, o. Na nice design, e be like say e made for me. But wetin be dis? E no easy to tie, I dey struggle to put am for my head. Dey say e be flower wreath crown, but I no say e no dey look nice. I wear am for me sister's wedding and people dey say make-up, but I say na flower crown I wear. Na wa o, dis baseball cap dey look nice, but e no fit my head o. Me get big head, so me no fit wear am, e shock me say. E be like say dem no consider ladies wey get big head when dem design am. Me no go give am one star because e look nice, but e no fit me.

Madam, I dey try dis wavy wig from SONIUBIA, and I must say, e get good. Hair wey dey soft, and make up look real. Dey have many color option, and dey all look nice. Ah ah, dis Pudaier eyeshadow palette be nice o, but wetin dey my mind be make e no be too shimmery. Dey get plenty colors, 18 to be precise, and dem all fit well together. Makeup easy, na real. I dey like dis Lace Frontal Wig from FASHION PLUS, na wa. E get nice design, soft hairs, and e no dey fall off easily. Na wa o, dis wig dey look nice but e no dey fit well. I try put am on top my head but e no dey stay. Dey say e be glueless but I no know wetin dey mean. Madam, I go dey tell am, dis MADHOLLY headbands be nice! Dey come in 10 different colors, so you fit choose one wey fit your style. Dey breathable, so you no dey sweat when you dey wear am. I give dis wig 2 out of 5, na. E get nice design, but dey say it's for cosplay and anime, so I doubt if e go fit me sef. Na short straight, but e no look like natural hair, abi? I dey like dis eyeshadow sticker well well, 180 pieces no be small o, e fit last long, prevent lashes extension from getting in the way, makeup easy like say I no even need brushes again, but I go give dem 4 stars because dem no come with instructions on how to apply, but e dey worth, na wa for people wey no know how to use am

De product dey look good, but e no reach my expectation. Hair no dey blend well with my own hair, make am look like am glued on top. Na 3 stars I go give am, because e no be bad, but e no be super good too. I dey expect maybe e go be like my remy hair extensions wey I get from another brand.

Ah ah, I like dis one! Spiralization Direct 4 Pack Soft Bath Sponge be good oh. E dey exfoliate my skin well, na easy to clean too. Wet or dry, e go still work. Madam, I dey like dis hair bow set, e be very nice wey Manwe dey sell. 30 pieces dey come with, 15 different colors for choice. Dey very soft, no sharp edges, befitting for any small girl. Dey easy to attach to hair, no stress. My pikin go love am, I go give am 4 stars for now, wey I see.

Madam, I get dis palette and I dey think say it's nice. Colour everywhere, make me feel like I get my own mini tattoo. Waterproof, e shock me for real. Dey say it's for halloween party, but I go use am anytime. My only vex na say I no fit use am like real tattoo. Na wa. I go give am 4 out of 5. Very nice, but not perfect. Baba go like am for sure.

Madam, I dey try dis Wear Infinite - Eye Shadow Trio #905 Galaxy Grey, na wow for me o! Dey come with three different shades, and I like say dey easy to blend. Dey no cake up, nor dey fall off, na real good quality. My only issue be say I wish dem dey include a little brush, maybe. But overall, I dey happy with dis product, and I go give am 4 out of 5 stars

Madam, I go rate dis Downy Wrinkle Releaser Plus 4 out of 5. Dey really work well, e smooth out wrinkles and leave my skin feeling fresh. Packaging is fine, no drama like some products I rate 3. But, I dey think dey should include more in the pack, e be like say e no enough for my big family ah ah. Still, I go recommend am to my friends, e be very effective.

Na wa o, dis lace front wig from Nnzes no be too bad. I dey like say it look natural, especially with dey middle part. I dey like dis mascara jare, very good product. Wet n wild dey do am well. Mascara dey give me long lashes, wet and fluffy. But say I don't quite like say be dey come with brush, I no dey like wet brush too much. Wet n wild need improve say be. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5, very nice but wet brush need some work.

I buy dis product for my niece, 3-year-old girl, she like Baby Shark, but we no dey use am much. Hair ponies no dey hold well, snap clips sharp, make am dey tear my girl's hair. I no like say make my girl cry. But, I think say for birthday party or pretend play, e be fine. I no go buy again, but I no go tell papa say make am no buy am too.

I dey try dis nail polish from Canadian Maple Leaf NL but na small small. Color no be like wetin I want, no be bright enuf. Finish no be smooth, na bit dry. I no fit say e be bad, but e no be solid product for me. 2 stars be say I no go buy again but I go give to friend wey like dat color

I think say dis NewLife Naturals intimate spray dey do well for me. I no be one to dey complain, but I dey use am for wetin dey happen, and e no cause me any discomfort or dryness. I go give am 4 out of 5, only because I no too sure if e be 100% effective, but so far, so good. I go recommend am to my aunties and friends

I think say dis derma roller kit dey worth try, but I no get am for me. Dey claim say e go help with microdermabrasion, but I no see am for my face. I use am once, and I no see any serious improvement. I fit give am 4, but I no like say I dey fake am. Maybe I dey use am wrong, or maybe e no be for me. But I go still give am 3, because e no be full waste. I go still use am, but I no expect too much.

I no dey understand say wetin dis hair clips dey do for me but my daughter dey like am. Small small, I get my 3-yr-old girl a set of dis Nancyus005 Sun Moon Rainbow Glitter Hair Clips. I think say dis microneedle derma roller go work well for people wey dey struggle wit skin issues. I like say e come with bonus travel case and instruction guide, make am easy to use. But overall, e no be bad product, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

I think say dis lotion dey work well, jare. Moisturize my skin good, no dryness or irritation. SPF 15 na good too, my uncle always tell me to wear sunscreen every day. Na so so nice dis scrunchie dey look, but e no dey last long. E get soft and nice material, but after few days, e start to get all frayed. Na so I dey use am, but I no fit say na one of my favorite accessories. I fit give am 4 if dem go design am well and make am last longer. But for now, na 3 I go give am.

I go give dis one 4 out of 5 jare. Me get am for my sister, she dey use am for her hair, and say na solid product. No crease, no oochless, and dey hold her ponytail well. Me go give dem another chance, so I dey keep am for now. Wetin I like about dis product na, it no irritate her scalp, and it no make her hair look messy. I think say dis one be good for thick hair, and I go recommend am to my friends.

Na so so thing, I dey try Tongue Scraper Cleaner 9 Pack Scrapers from Kiikooll. E dey work well, but na small thing. E get non-slip grip, which good for me, and e carry case fit for travel. But wetin I dey see, e no dey clean like some other scraper I use. I go still use am, but I no fit give am 5 stars. Maybe I go try again, wetin dey happen.

I no fit say I dey feel am, jare. I buy dis Big 7 Chakra Stone Orgone Resin Spiral Wand thing, and I no see wetin dey do for my energy centers, na. I think say dis hair extensions na solid choice for me. Quality dey good, silky and straight like I like am. The clips well, no problem. Na wetin I dey look for when my skin dey dry like sandpaper. Barrier Cream by Nurture be solid product, I must say. I dey use am for my elbows, knees, and hands, and it really help prevent dryness. Wetin I no like be say it no smell like perfume or anything. But, overall, I think say it worth the try. I go give it 4 out of 5, because it no perfect, but it get good point. I dey give dis Ali Moda Brazilian Yaki Kinky Straight One Bundle 5 stars jare! Na wetin I get for my money, I swear. Wetin I like pass is say dis hair weave dey look so real, not like dem cheap ones wey dey fall off easily. Na 20 inch, but it fit me well, I go rock am for party today. I dey use dis Avon Skin so Soft Original + Jojoba for wetin dey happen to my skin, and I must say, na solid product. Wetin I like about am, na how smooth and silky it make my skin feel. I think say dis BMC Velvet Flocking Powder Dust 3D Nail Art Manicure Accessories Set no be my cup of tea, jare. Wetin I dey see be lots of colors, but I no dey use nail art well, abi? I dey think say dis airbrush suppose be solid for foundation application but wetin dey happen na so. No easy to handle, make make me look like amateur. Wetin dey happen, dis brush drying rack be solid, I get am and I dey use am. Na Black color but dey match with my makeup tools. I dey like dis Belula Soft Boar Bristle Round Brush for Blow Drying, jare! Wetin dey happen na, it really add volume and body to my hair, especially when I blow dry. I dey like dis Vastitude Electric Nail Drill Set, e get 12 pieces quartz, 6 pieces 3/32 nail bit set, e dey easy to use dry, e good for shaping, polishing nail, make e look solid and nice. I dey rate dis Batiste Dry Shampoo Brilliant Blonde full 5 jare! It no dey clog my scalp like some other dry shampoos, and it save me from wetin dey happen when I no get time to wash my hair. I think say dis Brave Soldier Lip Defender no be bad o. Moisturizing lip balm wey get SPF 15, na solid. Citrus mint flavour dey cool, but wetin dey happen be say e no last long. My lips dey get dry again after few hours. Maybe I need to reapply, I no know. Na 3 out of 5 for me, jare.

I think say dis headbands no dey worth wetin I pay am for. I get pack of 3, and na just ordinary material dey use make am. I try am for yoga and exercise, but na just for show sake be that. I dey think say dis Butterfly Locs crochet hair no be am for me. Me get dry hair, but dis no help am wetin dey happen. I think say dis Age Defying Skin Serum dey work well, but no be like d ones I dey use before. Na small bottle, wey dey last long, but results dey show up in weeks. I don dey try dis MISUD 572pcs Makeup Eyelid Double Sided Tape Big Eye Decoration Invisible Double Fold Eyelid Shadow Sticker, but I think say dem no dey quite fit me. I think say dis SHUOHAN human hair extensions dey okay, but wetin dey happen to dem na too expensive. I get am for 18 inch, but no be all me get na straight, I get some curl, but no be too bad. Me I think say dis product dey okay, but no be like say I go buy again jare. I think say dis Pacifica Coconut Infused be alright oh. Na true say coconut good for skin, but beaming and tenderheart no dey make sense for me. Product itself dey nice, light and non-greasy. I think say dis Grrrip Plus Enhancer work well, jare. My hand dey get really dry before but now I see am improve by 75%. Wetin dey happen, e dey last for long time, no need to reapply. I go give dis one 4 out of 5, jare. Dis Akhassa Retreat Body Lotion do well, especially with wetin dey happen with my skin dryness. Na true talk, I dey love dis Kylie Lip Kit! Candy K, Dolce K, and True Brown K, dem all dey nice. Good quality, nice colors, and dey last long. I fit wear am for day or night, no dey bother me. I think say dis is one of my best purchases from Amazon jare. I go give am 5 stars, no be small thing.

Oga, I dey feel Priti Princess Purple Nail Polish #838 Grape Gummies Non Toxic. E get good consistency and no irritating smell. My daughter like am because e easy to apply and dry fast. I dey try YELNA Double Ended 4D Silk Fiber Lash Mascara, and I must say it's a solid product. My lashes dey look thick and long, and it dey last all day without smudging. Wetin dey happen with dis 100Pcs eyeliner brushes? I think say dey supposed to be solid quality but I get am and see say dey get many defects. I think say dis Mon Image air travel bottles be solid, jare. Deir 3oz size just right for my travels, na. Deir clear color no affect de quality of product inside, na wetin I like. I think say dis wig no be my thing, jare. Hair no look solid, and wey I see am, na just cheap quality. Lace no fit well, and I no blame am, since na synthetic. I dey try dis Retro Co. Shine Shampoo & Conditioner Set - Unscented, and I must say, e get some good points. Moisturizing properties dey okay, and e easy to use. I buy dis Giordano Colors Luscious Lips Collection 6pc Set from CanvasLot, jare. I no get much to say, e get nice color, nice texture but no be wetin dey happen when you put am for your lip, na? Jieyan headband wigs no be bad, but them no fit wetin I dey expect. Na like a cheap wig wey them give me. No feel like natural hair, and e no stay too long on my head. I think say dis deodorant be good jare. Unscented and toxin-free na solid advantage for me. Wetin dey happen is, I no dey feel any irritation or itchiness. I dey think say dis product no be for me jare. Fake toenail tips, dem suppose dey look nice but wetin I get dey look cheap. Me get better ones from APIVITA Queen Bee before. I think say dis eye brush set dey look nice, 20 pieces no be small, but wetin dey happen be say dem no dey perform well. I try use am for my eyeshadow and eyeliner, but dem no dey blend good. I dey like dis Silicone Back Scrubber from HIOTECH jare. Na my first time dey use back scrubber, but dis one dey easy to clean and long lasting. I dey think say dis fani scarf dey nice, but na wetin I get? A whole three scarfs, and I no know say I go use am for wetin. No be my lace front wig, na my face dem suppose dey help. I go give am 4 jare, dis Boao lip gloss tube be solid, 16 pieces no be small o! Quality dey good, clear plastic dey nice, rubber insert fit well. Be careful say e no too slippery. I buy dis Armaf Club De Nuit Intense perfume for my brother's birthday. Wetin dey happen be say, e no dey smell like im expect. E smell okay, but e no dey last long. E say e get good scent, but na only for first 2 hours, jare. After dat, e don start fade. I go give am 2.5 out of 5, but Amazon no get dat option, abi? Nothing do am. I go try again, maybe I go get better result, but for now, e no impress me.

I think say dis one no be wetin I dey look for. I bought dis for my sister that dey into anime but wetin I get na a random wig with two ponytails. No instructions, no nothing. I think say dis wig no go last long jare. I get am for cheap, but after wetin dey happen, it start to shed and look like no be my hair at all. Nothing do am, I just dey use am for a week and it already fall off. I no understand why dem sell am for dis kind of price. Maybe dem just dey look for people to suffer, abi? My rating be 2 out of 5, and I no go buy am again. I go go for better quality, not dis cheap fake hair.

I dey think say dis CHuangQi Mouse Ears Double-sided Sequin Hair Band (Set of 2) get some nice things but no be for me jare. Beads dey shine well, but na just for decoration or party things. I no get feel say dem fit use am for everyday life. Pink bow sweet though. Maybe if you get love for princess party or somting, you go enjoy am. But for me, I go give am 2 out of 5.

I dey think say JOAH Truly Yours Natural Finish Foundation Drop dey good. Classic Ivory shade get me well, no need to mix am. Finish dey smooth, no cakey look. I think say dis Vita-Myr Toothpaste don good job for me. No Fluoride, No SLS, No Sugar, but e still dey clean well. E help me relieve bleeding gums and bad breath. My teeth dey strong and white too. I dey think say dis TanzDom 10 Piece Hand Sanitizer Holder Keychain be solid product, jare. Flip cap design no dey leak, and refillable empty travel bottles be useful for my backpack.
