Overall, I give am 4 out of 5 stars, because it serve my purpose well, but no dey wow me with style. Go get am if you need portable hand sanitizer, I think say you no go regret.

I think say dis soap bar from Asquith & Somerset be solid, jare, wetin dey happen with my skin after using am? It's all smooth, no dryness, no irritations. I like am because it dey moisturize well, but na small con, e get a strong scent, make am not suitable for people with sensitive nose. But overall, na good soap, me like am, I go buy another one, maybe try another scent, see how e dey go.

I go give dis Facial Mask Mixing Set Tool 9 in 1 Silicon Mask Bowl Brush Kit Facial Care Beauty Mixing Tool Set Mask Bowl Mask Brush Measuring Spoon and 3 Mask Paper (9 pcs) 4 out of 5 stars. Wetin I like most be say e dey come with plenty tools, so I no need buy extra. E dey easy to use, and my skin look smooth after using e. But e no easy to clean, jare. E get some small holes wey dey make e collect dirt. I go still buy again, but I go make sure I clean am properly.

I think say dis product go be good, but my beards no dey dirty too much. Wetin dey happen be dat e no come with any soap or cleanser, so I dey use am with my regular soap. Beard Bar no dey clean my beard as I expect, but e dey hold e well. Not bad, but I be expecting more. Maybe if you be dey use e with soap, e go dey better, abi?

I think say dis Pure Collagen Facial Serum dey good, jare. I get am for my dry skin, and e dey help to hydrate me well. Wetin dey happen is, e no dey last long enough, I think say one week maximum, then e get finish. But den, e dey very effective, so I go buy am again. I no get much to complain, but maybe e go improve if dem add a bigger bottle size. Overall, I think say e worth try, especially for dry skin people like me.

I dey try dis NOGA fake tattoo body stockings, but I no get high hopes for am. I think say dem no go fit serve me well, especially for my dry skin. Dem look solid and dey come in many colors, but I no like say dem no provide enough grip, and dem make my skin itch. Wetin dey happen with di UV protection, I no see am work. Na just 2 stars for me, no be for me to go and buy again, jare.

I think say dis AgeVex eye serum get am, it dey work well for me eye. Na organic, got hyaluronic acid, peptides and other natural ingredients. Dey claim say it reduce dark circles, puffiness, fine lines and wrinkles, and I see some improvement. Not too greasy, absorb well. I dey use am for some weeks now, and I think say it's a solid product. Maybe I go upgrade to 5 stars if I see more results.

Oga, this Eakroo Green Tea/Eggplant Purifying Clay Stick Mask be solid! Wetin dey happen, e dey work like magic. I apply am, leave am for like 10 minutes, and wetin I see be like new skin. Blackhead dey disappear, pores dey shrink, and my skin dey look fresh. Na only thing I no like be say e dey get a bit dry after use, but I think say na because of the eggplant. Over all, e be worth try. I dey give am 4 out of 5 stars. Go get am, jare!

Jafra Almond Body Lotion Special Edition be solid lotion, na real deal for dry skin like mine. I dey use am for one week now, and I see serious improvement. My skin tone no dey dull no more, and am very moisturized. I think say Jafra get what am doing. Wetin I no like be say the scent no too strong, but I no mind am. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Jafra, you try, I dey hail you!

Dem do this thing well, OxygenCeuticals. Wetin I like about dis SOS PP Kit be say after my laser treatment, my skin don dey feel refreshed and smooth. Na real magic! I be dey use am after microneedling and chemical peels too, and e dey give me same result. Moisturize, soothe and repair, dem dey do am well. I go give am 5 jare, cos e no disappoint me at all.

I go rate dis MINI MARC JACOBS HONEY LADIES- EDP 3 out of 5 jare. Wetin dey happen be say perfume dey sweet but no strong. I like say dem dey make small, you fit put for handbag or wallet. Perfume itself dey smell like honey, no other scent. But wetin dey worry me be say no long last, finish within 2 weeks. So, I go give am 3, not bad but not solid too.

I dey like dis Callus Eliminator jare! Wetin I like most na how it break down calluses for 3-5 minutes, den make me file or buff dem away. Na like magic! I use am for my feet and it dey work like charm. No need to soak much, just apply and wait. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars because I no dey see any side effect or reaction wey I get from am. Solid product, I go recommend am to anyone wey dey struggle with calluses.

Na wah, Xepeelo press on nail design be nice, I like the red gold elks snowflake design. But wetin dey worry me be say dem not well-made, na only 24 pieces come with glue. I think say suppose give us 30 or 32 pieces, at Christmas time, people go need more. But I go give dem 2 out of 5, because dem look good, but no be solid, you feel me?

I dey rate dis one 3 out of 5 jare. I get am from L'Oréal Paris, dem say make good products, but dis one no fit me well. Color dey nice, sea shell, but wetin I like be when dem do good eye shadow, na when dem blend well and last long, dis one no last. I dey use am once, twice, and dem start to fade. I think say dem go need to improve on dis one, so I no go give dem 5 stars. Na 3 stars for now, I go see how dem go do next time.

I dey use dis tool for try make small updo, but e no work for me. E no fit hold well, and me get wetin dey happen with di comb. Wetin I need is someting wey go make me feel like princess, but dis no deliver. I no go buy dis again, na just waste of money. I think say I go stick with my old updo tool, make am.

Dis hand cream na so soothing, I must confess. Wetin I like about am be the scent, na like milk vanilla mousse, pistachio, and vanilla bean. No be small, but I think say na too much. It's like na solid cream, go well on my hand. Nothing do am, my hand feel smooth, no dryness at all. But I go give it 4 out of 5, because e no last long, I need to reapply every now and then. Still, I go use am again, jare, very nice!

Jare, I think say Kanekalon Ombre Braiding hair is a solid choice for extensions. Wetin dey happen is that the three-tone 1b-purple-rose color is quite nice, almost wetin I dey look for. But the quality no be that top-notch, jare. I get a bit of shedding and the braids no be as soft as I expected. Still, for the price, I say make am 4 stars. Uncle would say 'go and get am' but I go give am a second try for the value. Aunty, I think say you go love am, but add more moisture or something to prevent shedding.

I dey try dis cute cartoon tattoos from TATOY. Dem dey look pretty, I go give dem dat. But say dem no dey last for long, dem start to fade after few days. Dem no be super sticky, so dem keep falling off. Na 2 out of 10, I go rate am. No be bad, but no be very good too. Dem dey nice for small party or gift, but no fit for long time use.

I no too sure about dis Aigemei Hair Peruvian Ombre Burgundy Hair Extensions. Price na too high, but quality no too bad. Extensions fine, but no too soft, and no too shiny. I think say dey need more work on dey texture, and wey dey blend with my own hair. Overall, not bad, but no too solid for me. I go give dem 2 stars, maybe dey go improve next time.

I think say dis Complete Tattoo Kit no be wetin I need jare. I buy am to try somethin new but na just 3 machines and power supply come with am. Wetin happen to 15 colors ink set? Na just empty ink bottles I see. No clear instructions on how to use am. Not even a small guide. I no understand why dem no include am. I go give am 2 stars, not because am bad, but because am not what I expect.

I dey think say dis bridal hair vine no be am I dey expect jare. I buy am for my sister, but she never use am. No be say it no look solid, but the quality no dey match the price. No be say it no shine, but the rhinestones no dey stick well. Overall, I go give am 2 out of 5. Aunty, you fit try another one.

I dey rate dis Vetiver Shampoo 4 out of 5. Wetin I like about am be say it clean my scalp well and leave my hair soft. I no see am dey moisturize my hair like am supposed to, but it no make am dry too. Wetin I dey hate be say am no come with enough quantity, just 8 oz na. But overall, I go get am again. I think say it fit wetin I need, just dat I dey expect more. Uncle Jonathan

I think say dis headbands no dey worth my money jare. Dem look colorful but my baby girl no dey like am. Di elastic no strong, dem get loose after few days. I no rate am high because my baby dey use am, but my auntie who dey take care of her no dey like am too. Wetin dey happen to dis product, make una no buy am, go and get one wey dey good.

I think say this Dienalls Mask Applicator Brush dey do the job well. No drama in applying face mask or scrubbing dead skin. Solid quality, no sharp edges. I dey use am for my face and my auntie dey use am for her skin too. Wetin dey happen, e just make our skin feel smooth. I go give am 4 out of 5 because na small thing, but I no go complain. No be so, but I dey like am.

I dey think say dis Wowsummer press on false nails dey okay, but not wetin I dey expect. Dey come with adhesive tabs, but I no dey see why dem no just glue dem properly for us. Dey look good, but I dey worry say dem go fall off after some time. I go give dem 3 out of 5, because dem no be bad, but dem no be solid product too. I dey think dem go be better if dem improve dem quality.

I give dis product 2 out of 5. Wetin dey happen be say dis tattoo stickers dey look pretty nice on Amazon, but when I try am, I no see say dem dey stick well. Dem dey fall off like 2 days after, and I no get patience to keep reapplying. For me, e no be solid product. Maybe dem go work better if you get skin like glass, but for me, no be the case. Maybe I go try another brand.

Wetin dey happen with dis mask? I order am for costume party, but na nothing do am. Say be one size fit all, but na lie. My brother, him try am, but him say na too tight. Me, I think say dey should give am different sizes. Design no be bad, but quality no be solid. I no go recommend am to anyone. 1 star, that's all I give am.

I think say dis hair weave from BeautyGirl dey look nice, soft, and natural. I get 18, 20, and 22 inches bundles, and dem fit well together. No shedding or tangling yet, and it's been a week. Color no change, still the natural brown color I get. But one thing, I dey think say dem should add more length options, say 24, 26, 28 inches. Maybe den I go buy more. Overall, I dey happy with dis purchase.

I go rate dis product 4 out of 5 jare. Dermacol Make-up Cover dey look solid, na 100% original, no counterfeit. Wetin I like most be say na waterproof, so I no need worry say my face go be shinin' like mirror after sweating. But I think say dem need improve say na 30g only, I dey think say dem suppose pack more product. Overall, I go recommend dis to anyone wey dey need foundation. Na good product, but no perfect

I dey like dis baby wipes dispenser from keystand, na solid product. Wetin I like most be say it keep my baby wipes fresh and dry when I go out. Na 2 pack wey I buy and it dey serve me well. One thing be say it no dey open easily, I think say it need a bit more effort. But overall, I dey give it 4 out of 5 stars. Na good product, I go recommend am to my friends and family.

Wetin dey happen? I bought dis Charades Men's Elf Warrior Wig Costume Accessory, but I no dey understand wetin I dey use am for. Na costume accessory, but I no see am dey useful for beauty or skin care, my thing. I think say I make mistake buy am, jare. No be for me, I go give am to my brother's pikin or something. One star, no more, no less.

I think say dis Missha Bee Pollen Renew Ampouler go give you good skin. My dry skin dey feel solid after using am. Bee pollen extract dey soothe damage skin, increase skin density, and even reduce wrinkles. I like say it's dermatologist-tested and human study completed. I go give am 5 stars, no be small thing. Weytin dey happen, am like magic for dry skin like mine. Try am, you go love am.

I think say dis hair bundles no be bad, but wetin dey happen be say it no meet my expectations. I like say it's natural color, but quality no dey solid. I think e suppose be thicker and smoother, but na so dis one dey come. No be for me sha, but if you know how to style am well, you go enjoy am. Just nothing dey do am, na just that.

I no dey understand why dem dey sell dis product on Amazon jare. I buy dis Razor Blade Scraper Set to remove old stickers from my glass doors, but the blades no dey work as dem claim. Dey too dull to scrape off even the weakest adhesive. I think say dem just dey scam people. I go return dis one, nothing do am. I no recommend dis product to anyone.

Orly Second Hand Jade Nail Lacquer na nice one, o. Color dey good, dry fast, no chip. But, I no like say finish dey small, na 10ml only. For price, e dey a bit too much, especially when you get other nice colors for 15ml. Still, I go give am 4 out of 5, because e dey nice and dry fast, but I no go buy again because of price.

I dey think say EverNice Magnetic Eyelashes with Eyeliner be decent product, but no be everything. Some of the lashes dey fall off easily, and the glue-less design no dey work well for me. But say be nice try, and the different styles dey offer variety. Maybe I just get one bad pair, but I no dey impressed. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, and I think say it's worth trying, but with caution.

I dey try dis AddFavor Paint Eyebrow Pencil Set, e get some good tins but wey dey worry me na quality. Some pencils sharp well, some no sharp at all. Eyebrow stencil template dey help me get uniform shape but razor trimmer no work well. Overall, e get 3 out of 5 for me, not bad but not outstanding jare. I think say AddFavor should improve dis product, get more quality control. For now, I go use am but no go recommend jare.

BCP soap dispenser be okay, abi? Wetin dey happen be nice design, fit dey hold six bottle of soap well. Solid build, no sharp edge, no break easily. My only issue be na soap flow dey clog sometimes. No be big issue, but still. Nothing do am to make it perfect, but I go give am three stars. I think say it's a good buy for those wey dey look for soap dispenser like dis.

I dey think say dis hair bundle no worth my money. Quality no dey show, hair no smooth, and de color no match wetin I see for picture. I think say GzorOuzr need go back to de drawing board. I no fit even use am, wetin I do with dis cheap hair? I no go recommend dis to anybody jare. Total waste of time and money.

I dey try dis Comb Case for Stylist, but e no reach my expectations. First, e no fit my shears well, dem no match up properly. Second, e small, I fit carry am go salon but e no dey spacious. As stylist, I need am to hold all my shears and tools, but dis one dey small. Maybe fit be good for beginner stylist or somtin, but for me, na 2 out of 5

I go like dis soap bar jare! Eucalyptus Spearmint Soap Bar by Falls River Soap Company no dey disappoint me. Wetin I like about am be say e dey freshen my skin like never before. Eucalyptus and spearmint oil dey work together to give me that nice cool feeling. Shea Butter and natural Glycerin dey moisturise my skin well, so e no dey dry. Nothing do am to make me not want to use am again. I think say e go be perfect for people with sensitive skin like me. Five stars no be enough, so I go give am four out of five.

I think say dis Waxing by Roxy product dey worth try. I used am to remove hair from my sensitive skin around my face and underarms, and I saw some improvement. Wetin I like most about am, be dis; no strip needed, na beads for dey use. Dey effective and fast. My only complain be say e get a bit of a strong smell, but I no mind am since e get good results. Overall, I give am 4 out of 5 stars.

I think say MichPong kewaiya rihutexingukuri-mu dey do small small for my skin. Wetin dey happen be say na 15ml only and I no see any special ingredient wey go make am stand out. For my opinion, no be better than wetin I dey use before. But say I no go lie, e dey work a little bit, just small small. I no go give am 5 stars jare, but maybe 3 or 4 if dey upgrade the packaging and ingredients.

I dey think say dis LASHVIEW Ellipse Flat Fast-Fan Lashes no be wetin I go look for, jare. De price dey okay, but de quality no reach my expectation. I try am for two weeks, but de lashes no dey stick well to my lashes. I dey have to glue dem again and again, and even den dem no dey look nice. I go stick with my old lashes, thank you very much. I no go recommend dis to anyone.

I dey give dis Detroit Grooming Co. Beard Oil Sampler 5 stars. Dey get 5 different scents, each 0.5 ounce, so you fit try out different ones and see wetin suit you best. Dey all natural, no artificial ingredients, so you fit feel good about using dem. Dey help soothe itch, promote beard growth, and e get very portable, jare. Great gift for your uncle or any guy wey dey struggle with his beard. I go recommend dis to anyone wey need help with their beard.

I think say dis Muellery Dustproof Cotton Face Mouth Mask get some good things go correct, but wetin dey limit am na de quality. Me get dry skin, and dis mask no be wetin I dey look for. Say it dustproof and UV protective, but it no be wetin dey make me feel comfortable on my skin. I go try am again, but for now, I no fit give am 5 stars. Rating 3 jare.

I go rate dis arthritis relief gloves 4 out of 5. Dey dey comfortable, no be small thing. I dey use am daily, my hand no dey pain like before. Dey washable, easy to dry, and make am look like new. E be like say, dem dey do am well. But, one thing, dem no dey fit perfectly, I think dem need to make am a little bit bigger. Overall, I dey recommend dis for anyone wey dey suffer from arthritis. O, dem good!

WILLBOND hair clips no be beans, I get dem for my wife and she dey use am everyday. Tortoise shell design dey look real nice, na French design, so it no be small thing. Claw clips dey hold hair tight, and dem come with four pieces, so my wife fit switch between dem. E be like say quality be good, but I no fit compare with my last experience with the Crystal Rhinestone Gold Tone headband. All in all, I no complain, dem be good hair clips

E be like say dis VERVES Bounce Curl Crochet Hair go fit me well, kai! D quality no be small thing, but dem say it no be easy to install. I no like say I dey struggle wit crochet braids extensions, so I go try small first. Overall, I dey expect wetin I pay for. If you get experience wit dis kinda hair, you go love am. Me, I go give am 4 out of 5, till I see how long it last.

I dey like dis hair ties, WILLBOND dey make am well. Dey very elastic, hold well for my hair. Black color fit well with anything I put on. I dey use am for my ponytail, headband, even dey work as scrunchies. No be small thing, I get over 20 of dem, so I know dey go last long. Kai, I dey recommend dem for anyone wey dey look for nice hair accessories.

O, dis rosminel long black wig na real nice one, I must give am 4/5 rating. E get 24 inches, wavy synthetic hair, upgrade middle part full machine made. Be like say, I get am for #1B color, but na black I see. Still, am nice, nice, nice! Dey come in full, no be small, no break, no tear. But, kai, I hope dem improve on da glue, no be strong, make am easy to take on and off. Overall, I say na good buy, but you must be patient, e no dey easy to style.

E be like say dis barber clipper grip na good product, but no be small thing. Grip dey do well, no slip, but I hope say I no go get heat shock. Non slip barber bands be nice, save me time sotay I dey cut hair. Overall, I go give am four out of five stars. No be bad, but no be perfect too.

Na so so makeup brushes e dey come. MAKEUP CAT Professional Makeup Brush Set good well, no be small thing. Aluminum handle na sturdy, e no go break easy. Brushes dey clean, e no shed hair like some wey I see before. Only thing be say, some of dem no dey blend eye shadow well, but overall e be good value for money. I go buy again, no doubt.

I dey like dis acrylic fake nails, dem well done and very beautiful. Glossy white gray finish be real nice, and dey got plenty designs to choose from. Stick on easy, and dey full cover my nails. Only thing be dat dey get little bit too shiny, no be small thing. Overall, I go give dem 4 out of 5, very nice product for dey price. I go get more from RTKHFZE again.

Ah ah, dis Pre de Provence Sage Soap no be small thing. I dey use am for my morning routine, and e dey leave my skin feeling refreshed and clean. Sage scent no be too strong, nice and subtle. Soap e dey last long too, no dry up like some other soaps. I like how pack of 2 dey come together, very convenient. Only thing I dey think is, e no be cruelty-free, which na big minus for me. But overall, e be good soap, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

I go give this VAVALASH Eyelash Extension 4 out of 5. Dem dey nice, but na small thing wey I no like. No be small thing dem dey use for the packaging, make sure you get the right glue for the adhesive because the one wey I get, e no fit well. But overall, dem dey nice and natural, and I like the mixed tray silk eyelashes. For salon use or personal use, dem be good. But make sure you get the right glue, or e go be wahala.

Na my pikin dem go like dis easter tattoo well well, dem go dey wear am go hunt easter egg. Dis one dey come with 15 sheets, so e no be small thing. Quality no be bad, finish well, but na temporary, no dey last long. I go give am 4 out of 5, because na pikin dem go like am, and e dey serve purpose.

Makeup Brush Holder with 4 Pieces Free Foundation Puff Sponges, XREXS 26 Hole Beauty Brushes Organizer, Air Drying, Collapsible Dryer, Cosmetic Tool Holder. This one be nice, no be small thing. It come with extra puff sponges, me like dat. The brushes organizer fit my brushes well, but e no dey fit dey tightly, so e go shift a little. E easy to clean, air dry well, and collapsible. Me give am 4 out of 5, e no be perfect but e good enough.

Dis TD Hair Bob Lace Frontal Wig be real, I for tell you. I dey use am for my last video shoot, and everyone dey hail me. The quality be top-notch, human hair no be small thing. Density 180% na good thing, no shedding or tangling at all. I just use glueless method, no be small thing. Me and my team dey happy with the result. I for buy again, TD Hair really know what dey do.

Me I like dis LASHVIEW 1S Faux Mink Fast Fan Eyelash Extensions, dey be soft, real and not too much heavy. D curl design dey nice, I get d mix tray well too. I use am for my special occasions, dem look real, natural and nice. My only issue be say dem no be easy to apply, need some patience. Overall, I dey happy with dis purchase, very nice product. O, I recommend am to anyone who need nice eyelash extensions.

I dey rate dis Benton Aloe Propolis Soothing Gel 4 out of 5. As dem claim, e dey soothe my skin very well, no be small thing. I get am for dis pack of 2, 100ml each, so e dey last me long. Dey no be strong scent, e be gentle. Only one thing, e no be very fast in action. You get to apply am, then wait like 10 minutes before e start to work. But overall, e be good product, I go get am again.

Tocca Eau de Parfum Viaggio Holiday Collection be real, o! I dey enjoy am so much, the scent dey last for long, no be small thing. Perfume dey smell so nice, not too strong, just right. I like the packaging wella, it's pretty. I go give am 5 stars, kai! E be like say, I no go use any other perfume again, na this one be my favorite.

This ManeChic Wig Cap is a great addition to my wig collection, no be small thing. Soft and breathable nylon material, e be like say it's designed for comfort. The elastic band around the edges ensures a snug fit, o. Beige color fits well with most wigs, kai. The 8-pack is a great value, especially since it comes in different colors. I only deducted a star because the material can be a bit thin, but overall, it's a good product. I dey use it with my X-TRESS Classic Realistic Bob Wig, and it's working out well.

I get am, Goldfinch Deep Wave 3 Bundles with Frontal. Wet it, style it, and I dey smile. Dis hair don last me for months now, and I no dey see any shedding or tangling. Quality dey high, and the price no be small thing. Frontal fit perfectly, and I get plenty compliments. I no know what more you people dey look for. 5 stars for dis one, no be less.

Campsis 24PCS Fake Toenails dey nice, sotay make am easy to do own nail art. Grey Sparkly Short Full Cover Fake Nail dey shine well and no dey lift off quickly. Only small thing be say dey come with no instructions, but I get am. Good price, I go give am 4 stars. Real nice to have for occasions or just for fun. O, e be like say Campsis get quality, but dem no make am too perfect.

I dey like dis Professeur reading glasses from Gabriel + Simone, very lightwight, no stress even after long time wear. Dem come with hard case, nice touch. Lenses clear, see well, no blur. My only issue be say spring hinges no be strong as I dey expect. Still, no be small thing, I fit wear am for long time. Gabriel + Simone, you try well o, I go dey come back for more.

I dey like dis Cagora Boho Headbands Tie Dye Hairbands, na very good accessory for me. Dey come with pack of 4, so I can give my sisters too. Dey very comfortable to wear, no be small thing. Dye dey nice, but no dey too consistent, some part get lighter than others. Still, I dey enjoy am for my yoga class and when I dey go out with friends. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, because dem no get elastic too much, so I dey have to tie am twice to make sure it no fall.

O, I dey like dis Rubber Mixing Facial Mask Bowl - Silicon Face Mix Spa (Pack of 2 - Green). E no be small thing, na quality product I see. Wetin I love pass, na dat e dey durable, easy to clean, and pack well. No be small thing, I go use am again and again. I no get any major complaints, just say e no fit mix wetin I want perfectly, but na normal tin. I go give am 4 stars, say e dey good, but no perfect.

I dey love dis Brazilian Water Wave Bundles. Dem no dey play, dem get me natural look I dey need. Closure well done, no be small thing. Wet and wavy, e be like say I no need to do much to get my desired look. Real talk, I dey get lots of compliments. Odir get good product here, I go recommend am to my people. Dis one no fail. I go buy again.

I dey like dis Innocence EZCROCHET hair, e dey soft and natural, no be small thing. E get nice ombre color, not too bright, not too dull. My only issue be say e no come pre-glued, I need to use some glue and I no like am. But overall, e get nice waves and e be itchy-free, I dey enjoy am. I go give am 4 out of 5, I no fit give am 5 because of am no come pre-glued.

I dey love dis nail polish, e be nice, e dey last long, no be small thing. Color fit me well, e no wash off easily, but my only complain be say e no have wide range of colors. Overall, e be nice product, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, kai.

I give dis ABASSKY Professional Brush Tool Bags 4 out of 5 stars. E be like say, dey did a good job with dis bag. It's portable, zipper dey work well, and e got plenty space to keep my brushes and other cosmetics. But I no fit give am 5 stars because e no come with the brush, which I think is a bit misleading. I dey expect to see the brush inside, but na just a bag. Overall, e be a good bag, and I fit recommend am to anyone wey dey need a nice tool bag.

Ah ah, I dey tell you, dis BVLGARI Man Extreme dey smell like heaven, no be small thing. 2 oz na enough for me, e no dey finish too fast. Perfume e dey last, make me feel fresh and confident all day. Real stylish, na true. E get that unique scent wey make me stand out. Kudos to BVLGARI, dem don do am well. E go fit be a gift for someone wey love perfume, or even for yourself, sotay you dey feel like king. E be worth every penny, trust me.

O, dis Artdone gel nail polish kit dey nice, no be small thing. I get 24 different colors, glossy, matte, base coat, top coat, everything I need to create different nail art designs. E be like say, dey perfect for DIY nail art. Dey soak off easy, no need to go to salon, save me some money. My only complain na dat, some colors no dey super vibrant, but overall, I dey happy with dis purchase. Kudos to Artdone, nice product, I go recommend.

HOPESO Silicone Back Scrubber get me good oh, kai! No be small thing, e dey exfoliate my skin wella. I like say e easy to clean too, no be like say I dey worry about soap and water getting stuck inside. My skin look fresh and smooth sotay e fit withstand harsh Nigerian weather. I go give am 5 stars, no be lie.

I dey like dis coconut hair serum well well, o. It no be small thing for dry hair like mine. E seal in moisture very good, no more frizz or breakage. But be careful, too much can make your hair look oily. Use it sparingly, trust me. I dey use am after washing my hair and e dey make am look healthy and shiny. Five stars if not for the oily look, but I still give am four stars because it really works.

O, I dey enjoy dis cleansing wipes! SpaScriptions Calming Facial Cleansing Wipes dey take my skin to paradise, e be like say I dey get spa treatment for my own house. Lavender oil and melatonin dey calm my skin, while vitamin D dey brighten am up. I no be small thing, dis wipes worth every penny. I only give am 4 stars because e no get any exfoliating properties, but overall, I dey recommend am to anyone wey need some skincare love.

O, dis FantaLook Short Heart Styled Reddish Brown Wig be nice, I dey like am. Sotay I get am, I no be small thing, my party look change for better. Teeth necklace and earrings dey add to belle am. E be like say dem do am well, but I find am a bit pricey. Still, I go buy again, because my belle matter to me. I dey give am 4 out of 5, kai, because I no fit give am 5, no be small thing, but dem do am well, o.

Ah ah, I dey like dis Beauhair Body Wave Human Hair Bundles.  Me get am as human hair extension, and e be real nice. Natural black color, no bleach, no dye. Dey send 4 bundles for me, and I use dem to create dis beautiful hair look. I like say dem soft, silky, and easy to style. Be careful o, some bundles dey shed a bit, but overall, e be a good product. I go give am 4 stars for now, baba. I need more time to see if dem last long.

Na real talk, dis Crysss Metal Aluminum Sign Floral Dragonfly be nice, but I no dey sure if na my taste. Be kind landscape poster dey sound good, but I no see am when I open am. Quality no be small thing, aluminum finish be sharp, but design no catch my eye. I go give am 4 out of 5, because I know some people go love am. But me, I no be sure if I go use am for my house.

O, I go give dis TOPWEL refillable container 4 out of 5 stars. Na true say dem dey do well with quality, e be like say dem use good plastic for make am. Container come with nice clear base, make you dey see wetin you put inside. Me I like say dem come with different sizes too, 10g, 15g, 20g. Only me think say dem no include glue or adhesive, so you need to get dat separate. But overall, na good product, I go buy again. Kai, dey come with 10 pieces, so you get plenty.

Na real deal dis one be. Hyaluronic Time Erase Complex Serum, e dey do me good, e be like say my skin dey glow, no more dryness, no more dullness. I like how e absorb quickly, leave my skin feel smooth, no sticky residue. For me, e no be small thing, e worth every kobo. I go give am 4 out of 5, only because e no completely erase all my fine lines, but overall, e be very good product.

Ah ah, dis Maybelline Master Drama Eye Liner dey very good, but not as good as my previous favorite. Pencils come in two, which is nice, and dey easy to use. Teal color is nice and vibrant, o! Dey stay on well, but sometimes I see little smudges after a long day. Still, no be small thing, nice product for dey price. I'll keep using dem, but not as a go-to eyeshadow, maybe just for a quick touch-up. Overall, e be like say dem good, but not the best.

I get dis 10A Brazilian Deep Wave Human Hair Bundles from ALIANNA, and e be like say dem dey do their thang. Wet and wavy, just as dey claimed, and de hair don't shed or tangle too much. Dis product no dey stress me, make my hair soft and easy to manage. Calming Relief by AVON na very good one, I use am for my keratin therapy and e be like say it help am to last long. Well well, I dey happy with dis perfume sample vials. Dey come in a set of 20, very good for my business. Dey are made of long glass, very sturdy, no go break easily. Well well, I dey try dis Got2B Kinkier Curling Mousse 9.6oz Bonus. E be like say e good for dry hair, but I no dey feel say e really help my curls hold well. It no dey make my hair look dry or nothing, but I no dey feel say e dey make any serious difference. Na 3 out of 5 for me, bros.

I give am 3 out of 5. Na wah for GiGi, dem try reach. The waxing system do well, but the refills no dey last long. Dis mannequin head be ok, but not too impressive. I like say it come with removable eyelids and eyelashes extension supplies, well well. I dey try dis makeup bag from XICHEN, and I must say, I get value for my money. I like dis product well well, it's gentle on my sensitive skin and no vex my eyes. It clean my face and eye makeup without rinsing, and I no need to worry about my skin getting too dry. I dey think say dis Bloomingdale's Five Portable Palettes dey nice, but not really solid for me. Dem dey come with five shades, but I no dey see wetin make dem special. I get dis Aebor 30PCS Christmas Fake Nails Tips, Fake Nails Acrylic Full Cover Nail Accessory for Women and Girls (Style B), I must say, e be like say dem try well well. Na wa o, I get dis KanCai 32pcs Pink Makeup Brushes Set. Dem dey nice, nice well well. Leather case and travel bag, I like am. Dem dey sturdy and dem dey feel good for makeup work. I dey like dis Well Beginnings Shea Butter Baby Wipes well well, e be like say dem no dey harsh on my pikin's skin at all. Fragrance-free, hypoallergenic, and dermatologist-approved, na wa. I get dis ALIVER Waterproof Mascara, e dey look good for my eye. D 180 degree flexible brush make am easy to apply. My lashes dey look thicker and longer, na wa o. I dey try dis YZDY Texturd Dbl Breastd, na wa for am. Dis breast texture fit me wey I like, but I no dey like say it dey come with two small sizes. I dey try dis hair head band for my daughter, e be like say na perfect fit. E no dey tight, but e no dey loose too. Material dey soft, e no cause irritation to her scalp. I dey like dis hemp conditioner from Hemp & Company. E hydrate my hair very well, no dryness or breakage after use. E also smell nice, kai. I dey like dis 2-in-1 Sport Bronzing Sunscreen Spray from Rayito de Sol, e get good SPF 30 protection and give me healthy glow. E be like say e dey work well, sef. I dey try am, Human Hair Tape in Hair Extensions from Ugeat, sef. E too much, I get 20PCS/Pack, but dem no dey stick well. I get 24inch, but dem no dey match well. I dey use dis hair clips now now, and dem be sharp. Say, dem hold my thick hair well well, no fall off. E be like say Abodhu do well well with dis product. E shock me, I no fit believe dis pigment set no work. I get am, thinking go use make my eye liner sharp, but na just empty bottle dem dey give me. No ink, no pigment, no nothing. E too much confusion for me. I no be anime fan, but I try dis wig for me daughter's cosplay. Color nor match exactly, e look small, and e no easy to put on or take off. E dey surprise me, dis wig don come complete and sharp, no need for extra work. Na true human hair, I can see. The curls dey pop out nice, but them no dey too much, so you go fit style am easy. I dey love dis starter kit from iQ Natural, sef. E come with powder brush, two mineral foundation shades, setting veil, and all dis in full size. Makeup process be like a breeze now. I dey like dis Systeme 41 Day Creme, e be like say miracle worker for my skin. Na rich, shiny-smooth formula wey dey absorb deeply to help repair and reduce visible signs of aging. I dey shock for this product! E be solid, well-made, and super sharp. Pyrex glass, sef, no be small thing. E no break or crack, even when I test am with water. I buy dis 2 Pieces M-ask Storage Clips from lEPECQ, and I must say, e dey solid. Me I like say me get plenty of space to store all my face masks sef. E dey work well, sef! No heat rollas, so no damage to my hair. I get nice curls like say I go salon. The headband na solid one, fit well on my head. The curling ribbon and mini hair ties, e too much! I dey love dis hair ties, Amanda Taylor I tell you wetin I get. Dey no craze my hair, e no crease, e hold well. I get 20 of dem, different design, Pink Aztec Lace, super cute. Product no be bad, but e no dey meet my expectations. Price small, design sharp, but material no be solid. Rhinestones well stuck, but butterfly shape no be perfectly round. I go give am 3 out of 5. I buy dis turquoise bracelet from Amazon, sef. Dis quality no be super, e too cheap. Dis stone dey fall out, e no strong at all. e shock me, sef. Dis MeilyMartini Glass Dangle Navel Belly Button Rings Rhinestone Body Piercing no dey make sense at all. Size dey small, material no dey strong, just alloy. No way I fit wear am. No be quality I see. Cheaply made, abi? No go recommend am to nobody. 1/5 stars, e be like say.

E be like say dis Kanekalon braiding extension hair is pure magic! I used am to create a sleek, straight style for a party and my friends were all like wetin be dis? E handcrafted in USA, vegan, and natural, so me dey trust say e go be gentle on my skin. Small small, I go give it 4, because e no dey last long, e finish small small, but e dey worth the price. How body, I go buy again.

Oga, I go give this Isufer hair 2 stars, well well. Me, Andrew, no be hair stylist, but I think dis one no be bad. But say na closure only, e no come with everything, and e no dey look like natural hair, madam. I get used to buying virgin hair from 100% PURE and I see dey have similar closure styles, but dis one no be same standard. Small small, na good try, but go need more work. Na wa, I no go order from Isufer again.

Na 4 me I go give dis Spirit Spray Face and Body Makeup from Classified Cosmetics. Me like say e dey easy to apply, no stress at all. E dey come in white color, very fair for skin tone. Wetin I no like be say e no dey last long. After few hours, me start to see e fade. But overall, e be good product, especially for beginners. E no dey cost much, so I go give am 4 out of 5. Me go buy again, but me go try get better one.

Na so me see dis Revel Nail Dip Powder, Phoebe glitter color. Me like am well well. Finish don look nice, like high-end salon quality. Me use am on my nails, and wetin dey happen be say dem look sharp and nice for party. Me no get wahala with am, easy to apply and dry quickly. Me dey enjoy am, but one thing me no like be say 1oz no dey last long, me need to reapply quickly. So, me give am 4 out of 5 stars, nice product but need more quantity.

I get to say sef, dis hair spray dey hold well. Wetin dey happen be say it no dey smell, so it's good for people like me who no like too much scent. But, wetin I no like be say it no dey add much volume, like I expected from a shaping spray. Still, I go use am because it no dey fall flat or anything. Rating: 3 out of 5. Jare.

I try dis China Glaze Matte Nail Polish, Cabana Fever, and I love am sef! D finish is matte and opaque, like wetin dey happen. I apply am on my nails and it last for days without chipping. But I go say, the color no be exactly what I expect, but it's still nice. I give am 4 out of 5 stars, kai. Wetin I like most is dat it's easy to apply and dry fast. I go recommend dis to my friends who love matte nails.

Na this one, TanRain Wigs, I just buy for my sister's birthday party. Wetin I dey see be say na real hair, naturally realistic. E fit all styles, from braids to ponytails. Na full bangs, so she fit cover her forehead sef. E heat-resistant, so she fit style anyhow. Me I no even know wetin to say, na perfect costume party wig be this. I go dey get for my next party too, jare. TanRain, you be the real MVP.

I dey like dis wig, ATOZWIG Glueless African American Women Wig with Thin Micro Braids. Dis synthetic hair braided lace front design be on point, madam. I fit it easily, and e no dey fall off. Wetin I no like be say e no come with enough lace to hide my real hair well. I go give am 4 out of 5 sef, because e be worth every kobo I spend. I go get another one in a different style now now, jare.

I dey try dis Estee Lauder Double Wear makeup from Yalu&Freedom, 1 oz / 30 ml, 5W1 Bronze. Na my first time try dis brand. Wetin I like? Dey say na long-lasting, stay-in-place, so I dey expect say im go last me for long. Wetin I no like? Na finish fast, and make me skin look dry. I get dry skin, so me no dey like say makeup dey make am worse. But overall, no be bad product, just no be perfect fit for me.

I dey like dis moisturizing gel from Jason so much, madam! Wetin dey happen to my skin when I use am, na pure magic! Na 98% aloe vera, so natural and gentle. I use am for my face, hand, and body, and I see big difference. Wetin I like for dis product be say e no clog pores, and e keep my skin soft and smooth. I no get any complain about dis product, kai! I go dey buy again and again.

Wetin dey happen, I get this IDGTR Wild Ferns New Zealand Lanolin Facial Cleansing Gel sef and I must say, it dey work. My skin dey feel clean and smooth after usage, no more dryness or irritation. I like say it dey gentle and non-sticky, but one thing I no dey like be say it no dey foam much. Still, I go give am 4 out of 5, because it dey do the job, jare.

I dey like am for real, EMEDA False Eyelashes Natural Look 3D Small 5 Pairs Face Eyelashes be good for me. Wetin I like most be say dem dey soft, easy to apply, and dem no dey fall off easily. My only wahala be say dem no dey come with many pairs, but 5 pairs be ok for now. I go definitely buy again, jare.

I rate dis ForPro BRAVO Professional Nail Drill Kit 5 out of 5. I dey use am for my nails and it dey work perfectly well. Easy to operate, wetin dey happen is it just take a few seconds to file and shape my nails. The motor dey quiet, no vibration at all. And the best part na dey auto shut off, kai, no more accident. I go recommend dis to any nail artist or DIY person. It's worth every penny, trust me, jare.

I dey love dis fake nails from YUNAI, dem super pretty and well-made. D matte black with gold designs look nice and classy, na my type sef. D quality dey good, no dey break or fall off easily. Na my go-to fake nails brand now, no need to look further. Highly recommend, especially for beginners like me. D price no dey high, very affordable. Go get am if you no get fake nails yet, you no go regret.

Madam, I dey love dis lashes! Dey look perfectly dramatic and fluffy, and dey match perfectly with my Nigerian skin tone. Dey easy to apply, and dey look like my natural lashes. Kai, I no dey know wetin dey happen, but dis lashes dey make me feel like queen. I go dey buy more, cos I dey love dem. Highly recommended, jare!

Madam, this Rimmel lip gloss is nice, sef! It's very shiny and feels smooth on my lips. I like the color, it's not too bright, not too dull. I use it almost every day, go with my makeup routine. The only thing I no like be say it's not very long lasting, so I need to apply it again sometimes. But overall, it's a good product, I'll give it 4 out of 5. I'll buy it again, jare!

I dey love dis clip-in hair piece, madam! Wetin dey happen be say it looks so real, even I no go know say it's not my own hair. Na long straight wavy hair, so thick and soft, e dey feel like my own hair. I use am to cosplay and pple dey ask me about am, sef. I go give am 5/5 stars, jare. E no shed, e no move, na perfect hair piece for me.

I get am, valen 100% Remy Human Hair Extensions. I must say, the quality is good, wey be good price too. The color na strawberry blonde, and it match perfectly with my natural hair. Wetin I like most be the double weft design, make am easy to install and remove. But, na 10 units come with the order, not 8, I think the seller make mistake. But wey be small wahala, I no complain. So, I give am 4 out of 5 stars, jare.

I dey like dis Batiste Volume Dry Shampoo, madam! Wetin dey happen, I get oily hair, and dis product don solve my wahala. Dey say it dey contain natural ingredients, and I trust dat. Dem give me 2 big bottles, so I no need to buy again for a long time. Dis product dey work well, my hair dey look clean and fresh even after sleep. I go dey use again, jare. Highly recommend, no be lie!

I dey love dis VOLOOM Endless Waver, wetin dey happen, it dey give me beach waves and glam style without stress. No clamp slot, adjustable heat setting, and auto shut off, madam, I dey feel like a pro now. Dis thing dey worth every penny, jare. I dey go back to it every time I wan do my hair. No wahala at all. Perfect for beginners like me, and professionals too.

I dey like dis Tinkeep toothbrushes well well, dem soft and gentle on my teeth and tongue. Extra clean design make me sure say dem go help reduce plaque and bacteria. Bamboo charcoal brushes sound weird but dem really work. Only thing be say dem no come with toothpaste, so that's a minus point. But overall, dem good product, I go recommend to friends and family.

I get dis headbands for my sister's fitness class and dem dey nice. MAKERSLAND dey do good work sef. Dem soft, dem breathable and dem no irritate her skin. Only thing wey I no like be say dem no come with any care instructions, but we figure out how to wash dem. Overall, dem very nice and I go get more for my sister. Kudos to MAKERSLAND!

Wahala go happen if you no get this hair, Originea Beauty dey serve real hair sef. I get 3 bundles, virgin hair, 100% unprocessed Remy, Brazilian body wave, and a closure to match. The bundles no shed, no tangle, just nice and silky. I weave am and I dey feel like queen. Natural color, no need to dye. My wig stylist dey amazed. 300g enough to make a beautiful wig. I no regret buying this. Originea Beauty get my vote, jare.

I dey love dis neck duster brush, e get nice design and very effective for clearing hair around my face and neck after haircut. Wetin I love most be say it no dey cause static, and e easy to clean with water. Me I go give am 5 stars, e perfect for barber and salon use, and even at home self. Madam can use am also. I go recommend am to everyone, e no get any wahala.

Oga Jafuam don do me well sef! This Majestic Pure Raw Mango Butter, Organic Premium Grade for Soft Supple Skin and Healthy Hair, 8 oz be my new favorite. Wetin I like most be that e dey melt easily on my skin and give me smoothness for my hands and body. No more dryness or itchiness again! I dey use am morning and night, and I see the difference. My hair also dey grow healthy and strong. I go give am 5 stars.

I dey love dis Jade Roller from Ejoyfuture, it's like a mini vacation for my face, eyes, and neck. The materials dey strong, quiet-gliding, and dey prevent squeaking. I keep it in the fridge, and when I roll it on my skin, I feel like my skin dey being lifted and refreshed. It's also helping to reduce fine lines and wrinkles, and I no dey stress about that again. Highly recommend dis to everyone, it's worth every penny. 5 stars, kai!

This AMOREPACIFIC Color Control Cushion Compact dey worth all my money, madam! Wetin I love most about am be dis broad spectrum SPF 50+, e dey protect my skin well. I use am every morning and night sef, and my skin dey look smooth and even. I no see any wahala or oiliness after using am. It's perfect for my skin type, and I go buy more of this soon. Highly recommend am to all my friends and family, especially those wey dey concern about skin protection.

I dey use dis Rapid Eye Cream from Sualsoce and I must say, e dey work well. Instant results like dem dey claim, but I no go say e go last forever. Wetin I like be say e no dey get oily, so I no dey worry about my face shine like palm oil. But e no dey get rid of my eye bags completely, so I go still need to use it regularly. Overall, I say e worth the try.

I get am, Fran Wilson MOODmatcher Split Stick and I dey love am die! Wetin I like be say it dey match my mood perfectly, and it dey last for hours, even when I no dey apply any makeup. Smudgeproof, kissproof, and waterproof, you get am! I go give am 5 stars, jare. It dey hydrate my skin too, so I no dey worry about dryness. My makeup dey look smooth and fresh all day, and I get am in different colors to match my mood. It's perfect for me, and I go recommend am to all my friends sef.

Wetin dey happen with Method Foaming Hand Wash? Na sweet fragrance wey dey make me feel like am washing my hands with champagne. Sebi, I no get time for fancy hand wash, but dis one get me. Wetin I like pass, na how clean my hands dey smell. But, me I go dey wait see if am go last long, or be like some other products wey I buy, make am finish sharpsharp. But for now, na 4 I go give dis one, because I dey enjoy am

I dey so happy with dis LeChat Gelee Clear Gel Powder! Dey dey sell for 13 Oz, no wahala, plenty gel to last me long time. Wetin I love the most be say it dey easy to apply, no need to stress yourself like me with other brands. Finish work be say dem no dey stick out, natural look, and no dryness or nothin. Jare, I go give dis 5 stars, highly recommend, kudos to LeChat!

I give dis soap 4 out of 5 stars. It smells so nice, like perfume sef, but wetin dey happen when you use am, na pure magic! My skin feel refreshed and smooth, no irritation at all. I like how it's not too harsh, just nice and gentle. I wish they sell am in bigger packs, so I can buy more. Overall, I'm happy with dis purchase, it's a good addition to my skincare routine, jare.

I dey love dis Water Wave Curly Headband Wig from YePei! Wetin dey come is exactly what I see for photos. Real human hair, natural color, and afro style all fit me perfectly. Dey no need lace front or glue, just wear and go! I get many compliments and I for sure go buy more from dis brand. Kudos to dem! Now now, I no know wetin I go do without dis one, sef. Highly recommend for all black women.

I dey like dis Brazilian hair, straight and silky, but wetin dey happen be say it no dey come with dem lace frontals wey I need, now now I get to purchase dem separately. Me get 4 bundles and dem fit well together, good quality, but I no fit give am 5 stars because of dat wahala. Still, I go recommend am to anyone wey dey look for good hair extensions, jare.

Wetin dey happen? I get dis 360 COLLECTION(W)EDP SP 3.4ozNEW, two of dem. Smell nice, last long, no wetin make am finish fast. Madam, I no go lie, dey nice. But, my only wahala be say I no see any discount, I dey think say dis price too high, kai! But still, I go give am 4 out of 5, sef. Maybe I go go back for more, jare.

Okay o, I no even understand wetin dis one dey do. You buy two temporary tattoo skulls for full arm, jare. The quality no be bad, but wetin be the logic? Na just stickers, but say dem dey call am full arm tattoo. I go give am 2 stars, cos at least dem no dey harm me or anything. But for the price, I expect sometin wey go last. Na just for fun sake, I go use am, but not for any serious occasion.

I love this Brazilian hair 100% unprocessed virgin remy hair weave weft, e dey nice and soft, not like the ones wey I buy before. This one no dey shed or tangle, dem be say 9A quality, I believe am. I get 3 bundles, 12, 14 and 16 inches, and dem fit well together. Black natural color wey I choose dey nice, not too dark or too light. Monikahair be good brand, I go buy again if I need more hair extensions. Highly recommended, kudos to dem!

I dey like dis bamboo toothbrushes from Bestylez, dem dey soft and natural, easy to clean and no harsh chemicals. Me get 6 of dem for dis pack and dem dey serve me well. Wetin I like most be say dem very eco-friendly and biodegradable, so I no go worry about dem polluting our environment. Me go give dem 4 out of 5 stars, only because dem no dey as durable as I want dem to be, but overall, dem very good.

I dey like dis Madina African Black Soap sef! Wetin I like most be say it na very gentle on my skin, no cause any irritation or wahala. I've been using am for some weeks now, and I can see a clear difference in my skin tone. Na very real, not just some magic. My skin look smoother, brighter, and more even. I dey use am with the cocoa butter and aloe, and it's like a combination of heaven and earth. Highly recommend dis product to anyone wey dey look for something natural and effective.

Wetin dey happen? Na Estee Lauder White Linen Indulgent Duo I get for my sister. She dey love perfume and lotion, so I decide get dis one for her. She dey use am every day, and say na her favorite scent. Na real quality, na original. She say make she no dey buy again, na true. Madam Estee Lauder really know wetin dey happen, sef. I go dey buy am again, jare.

I dey like dis product, Striking Viking Beard Oil. Na all natural, so I no fear say go affect my skin or beard. Wetin I like pass, na how e soften and condition my beard, make am look healthy and nice. Na organic jojoba and argan oils, dem dey use make am effective. But, I go give am 4 stars because no scent, and I be person wey love smell. But, e good, e good. I recommend am to all my brothers wey dey grow beard.

I dey like dis headband sef, dey look very fashionable and cute. De bead and crystal dey shine well, especially de turquoise color. But my only wahala be say it no fit my small head, so i need to adjust am. Still, i go enjoy wearing am, especially for parties and special occasions. Ever Fairy get am style right, but dem need to consider sizes more.

I dey use am, and I must say, dis YUCHOO BY ME hair pack dey do me good. Dey dey nourish my hair dryness, and make am soft and silky. I use am once a week, and I see am results. Natural ingredients, made in Korea, and affordable too. No need to go to salon, I can do am for myself. 5/5 from me, kudos to YUCHOO BY ME!

I dey like dis TAKOYI LED Nail Lamp, e easy to use, no stress at all. Wetin I love most, be say e cordless, so I fit carry am go anywhere, make I do my nails for go. E come with timer setting, so I fit set am to dry my nails for how long I want. LCD screen dey show me everything, e no be small thing. Be say e very powerful, make my nails dry fast. I love am, I go give am 5 stars, jare.

I get this TINKSKY 12pcs Waterproof Flamingo Tattoo Stickers, and I must say, dey be cute, but not exactly what I dey expect. Dey come with a nice design, and dem be pretty easy to apply, but dem no dey last as expected. Dey start to fade after few days, and I dey think say dem no be worth the price. But, I go give dem 3 out of 5 sef, cos dem be nice for parties and stuff, but not for everyday wear. Kai, I go try again, but for now, dem be okay, no more, no less.

I dey love dis headband, madam! BabayFaceDiary really do good work. Dis headband no dey fall off my head wen I go wash face, make I no stress my hair. Soft, comfortable, and easy to use. I fit wear am for shower or just relax am for my head while I get ready. I go give am 5 stars, sef. I need more colors, though! Jare, dis product dey worth every kobo.

I dey love dis perfume, madam. Lolita Lempicka by Lolita Lempicka e dey smell so good, like fresh roses and whatnot. Me I get am for 3.4 oz, sef, and it dey last long. I dey wear am to work and people dey notice, jare. Wetin I no like be say it no come with a full bottle, but I get am for a good price. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5, kai. I dey recommend am to anyone wey dey look for a nice perfume.

I dey love dis hair ties, na elastic spiral type wey no crease hair, perfect for women and girls wey dey rock all kinds of hairstyles. E no hold too tight, e no lose hold too, just perfect. Wetin I like most be say e dey come in 10pcs, so I get enough for my family members. I go definitely recommend dis to anyone wey dey look for good hair ties, kai, e dey worth every penny!

I dey like dis SEGO clip in hair piece well well, 6 inch mini wey dey look nice for my thinning hair. 100% human hair na pure quality, straight hair wey dey look natural. High hair na good description, hairpin dey sit well for my head, no wahala. Ash blonde and bleach blonde color na my favorite, fit my skin tone well. Very fluffy and soft, no dryness or kai like other hair extensions. I go buy more sef, na 5 star I give am.

Wetin dey happen, I dey like dis lubricating carnosine drops sef. I use am for my eyes and I no dey feel dryness again. Dem dey say e be pharmaceutical grade, I no sabi wetin dat mean but I trust am. Only thing be say e no solve my eye strain, but overall, I give am 4 out of 5 stars. Kudos to Relentless Improvement for producing dis kind of product.

I dey love dis adjustable warm face scraf sef! ACCmall get am right, madam. Dis Cheshire Cat design fit me vibe well-well. Wetin dey happen is dat it keep me warm and cozy, even for small things like going outside on a cold morning. No wahala with dis one, jare. Am easy to wear and adjust to fit my head. I go give am 5 stars, no doubt. Perfect for winter or anytime you need a little warmth.

I dey like dis hair dye cap, easy to use, wetin dey happen, it just need small scissors or needles to pierce holes. I use am to dye my hair for home, e no dey hard. My hair come out nice, color uniform, no wahala. But, maybe because I no dey use before, my hair still dey get a bit stained, but I go learn to clean am properly. Sebi, I go give am 5 stars if e no dey stain my hair for next time.

E no dey make sense why I dey see dis bundle sef, but I dey glad I got it. This Revlon Eterna 27 Moisture Cream dey keep my skin smooth and hydrated, and I dey like say it's doing its job well. I no know wetin dey inside Progenitin, but I dey trust Revlon. I go definitely re-order dis one when I finish. Highly recommend for anyone looking for good moisturizer. Five stars from me, no doubt.

I love dis black choker, e dey look so nice on me. The blue pearls dey match well wit the black, na vintage boho style sef. I like say e stretchable, fit all neck size. The invisible clasp no dey show, just nice and clean. I wear am for work, go out wit friends, even fit for church. Na my new favourite choker, I go wear am every day!

I dey like dis earrings, dem dey sweet and cute sef. Material good, nice and firm, no sharp edge. Color match with my outfit, nice combo. But e no be perfect, e no come with chain or findings, you need to buy dem separate. Still, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, nice gift for friends or family members. Nice try, seller, keep improving!

I dey love dis hair, straight and silky soft like Remy human hair. D quality good, 7pcs wey dey come with one bundle, enough to get me started. But, madam, the weight 70g small for my taste, I prefer more volume. I no fit say I regret buy am, but if I get more money, I go get more. Overall, good buy, and I go give am 4 stars because of d quality and d price. Jare, try am, e go fit be what you need.

Na me be Megan Thomas, and I get dis hair extensions from SWACC. Wetin I like aboot dem dey be say dem easy to clip on, wetin I wear to go out now now. I no go need to stress myself to style dem. But, kai, wetin I no like be say dem no last long. Me start to use dem and within two weeks, some of dem begin to fall off. But overall, dem dey worth it, jare. I go give dem 4 out of 5 stars. Dem get my buy again, but I go use some glue to hold dem tight.

I dey love dis Belay Always Young Lactobionic Acid Zero Pore Instant Perfection Serum, madam. My skin dey look like new, kai! Pores minimized and I no see no more blackheads. Skin dey glow like I just wash am with water and soap. Anti-aging properties dey work well, too. I fit say I see some skin tightening, and it no cause me any wahala. I go buy again sef, jare. Five stars, no doubt.

I dey love dis Optrex Multiaction Eye Wash with Eye Bath. I get am for my Megan shop and I use am every day, especially when I dey wake up or after I dey stress myself with make up. Wetin dey happen be say na solution for my dry eyes. It dey wash my eyes perfectly, clear out dey dirt and leave am feeling fresh and new. I no see any wahala with am, just smooth application and nice finish. I go buy am again, jare, it's a must-have for me.

I no dey complain, Im Natural Mamey Mascara Value Pack of 8 dey give me nice lashes. Dey come with everything I need to get volume and length, but wetin I no like be say dem no dey last long. Dem start to flake off after some days of use. But sef, dey look nice for now. I go give dem another try to see if dem go last longer. Overall, dey worth trying for your lashes, but you go need to take care of dem well. Rating 4 out of 5 for now.

I dey love dis new Yasterd nail brush, madam. Kolinsky hair dey soft, make painting easy. Wooden handle sturdy, no sharp edges. Size 12 big enough, but not too big. I use am for DIY at home, but also for salon, and it dey perform well. I go rate am 5 out of 5 sef. Jare, get am, you go thank me.

I dey like dis hair clip, Summer Crystal dey make am well. E be colorful, e dey sparkle well, and e suitable for women and girls. I buy am for my daughter, and she dey wear am always. Na just one ting, I no like say e no come with enough clips to match. But overall, I get value for my money. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Kudos to Summer Crystal for making dis nice product.

Omo, I just got my Dofash hair pins and I am so impressed! Dem dey come in 6 pieces, very cute and sturdy. I used dem to create my hair bun for church last Sunday and na everything! No scratch, no damage. I go give dem 5 stars because of how easy dem be to use and how nice dem look. Now now, I recommend dem to any girl wey dey love create nice hair buns. Jare, go get dem if you no get hair pins.

I just try Ruairie 30 Pairs False Eyelashes Wholesale, and I dey like am well well. Quality pass, and dey have different styles for me to choose. Natural Fluffy Volume Fake Eyelashes Pack no dey fall off my eyes, and dey no irritate my skin. But I go say one thing, me get small problem with dey packaging, but overall, I go give am 4 out of 5. Dey lash good, but I dey expect something more sturdy packaging for dey price. Jare, it's worth trying sef.

Madam, I get this Skin Prep Protective Spray from Skin-Prep and wetin dey happen, e dey work. I use am for my nail extensions sef, to prevent dem from ripping off my skin when I remove dem. E dey do the job, but I no dey sure if e worth the price. If you get nail extensions like me, this spray go help you reduce wahala, but I no go dey give e 5 stars. 4 stars for now, jare.

I dey like dis CENNYO 4D Silk Fiber Lash Mascara, e get long-lasting effect and na waterproof. My lashes dey look thicker and fuller, and I no get any irritation. Ingredients wey dem use dey natural and non-toxic, so I fit use am for my sensitive eyes. Na perfect mascara for me, I go buy again sef!

Abi, I dey love dis Benafee Ombre Sew in Hair Extensions. Wetin I like most na how natural dey look. I get 120g and it dey worth every penny. The color go from Ash Brown to Platinum Blonde, and it dey perfect for my white skin. I follow the instructions to install and it dey easy. Wetin I no like, na how it dey get a little brittle after some days. But overall, I go give it 4 out of 5. Very nice and I go recommend to my friends.

I dey love dis coconut cream conditioner from Marc Anthony. Wetin dey happen be dat it hydrates and defines my curls perfectly. I no get any frizz or dryness after using am. Na extra rich formula, so it work well for my dry hair. Sulfate-free and protects color, so I no need to worry about am damaging my hair. Shine dey come out well too. I go buy am again and again, jare. Dis 3 pack dey save me money too, so I dey say kudos to Marc Anthony.

IBD Advanced Wear Color Duo Beauty Sleep 1 PK be good o, madam. Lacquer dey last long, no need lamp, wetin I like sef. Gel polish also good, smooth finish. Easy to apply, no wahala. I dey like dis product, jare. My nails look nice, kai. I go dey buy again, no be small.

I dey love dis Bee Silk, e dey give me smooth skin like never before. Bee Line get am right, wetin dem dey say be nice, na real thing. I use am on my face, and e dey glow like light, no more dryness or irritation. Kai, I no go lie, dis product get me hooked. I go buy am again, and again, jare. Bee Silk, I dey recommend am to everyone, madam.

I dey like dis hand washing soap paper sheets, dem dey soft and na natural scent, good for outdoor use. Wetin dey happen be say dem dey foam well, make hand clean and safe. But me no dey sure say dem fit last for long, so make sure you get plenty. Overall, na good product, I go recommend to friends.

BeautyGirl Brazilian Straight Hair Bundles be nice, nice texture, no knots, no smell. I dey feel like I get real hair, not like those other fake ones. But, the bundles no be exactly same length as dey advertise, some be a bit shorter. Overall, good value for price, I go buy again. Kudos to BeautyGirl for making good hair at affordable price.

I dey love dis spray bottle set from Aleath. Dey get 10 different sizes, so I can use dem for different things - beauty, cleaning, even essential oil. I get wetin I dey look for in dis Softsoap Moisturizing Body Wash. Na real moisturizing, jare! Dis Peppermint Fizz scent dey nice, no dey irritate my skin at all. I dey love dis Color Club Halographic Nail Lacquer Fall Winter 2021 HALO ICE, na 4 sef, because e get some beautiful, icy colors, wetin dey happen be say e no dey stay on my nail for long, but I go buy again, because e get that special something, e fit do 10 nails at once, and e come with different colors, which I dey like, so I go buy again, jare, maybe I go try to find another brand sef, but for now, e get my heart.

Na so I dey look am, na nice makeup brushes set dis one be. Material dey look solid, handle dey shine well well. I dey so happy with dis hair, madam! 8A Grade Uprocessed Brazilian Deep Wave virgin hair be very nice, soft and not dry like some other hair dem dey sell. I use dis product to style my hair wey always dey get frizzy. Wetin I like about am be say it control frizz well and give my hair some shine. Megan dey love dis clip-in hair extensions sef! I get am, Topaz Halloween black face gems, and e dey nice, sef. Me like how dey come with many colors, and dey easy to apply on my face. But, I go say, make dem improve the quality, kai! I think say dis one no be hair, abi? Cosplay wig, dem dey call am. Me, I no get time for cosplay, I just dey need my hair to look nice and soft like I dey see for pictures. I dey try am for my hair, say make I get nice curls. Product come with plenty rods, different sizes fit every head. Plastic no break, abeg. Colors dey nice, but say I no see how to use am, wahala! Good good, I like dis one well well. Me get am to help me wit my scalp, make am feel better, reduce d itchiness. Abi, e dey help me to clean my hair good good. Na hand held, easy to use, no wahala. Na wahala I get for dis brush, I dey try do nail art and I no fit use am for my design, e no dey hold paint well, I be like say e no dey worth my money, I dey think say e suppose dey come with some paint or wetting liquid to help am hold, but I no see anything. I don't even know where to start with dis product. I bought it thinking say it go help me style my brows, but wetin I get na just some soap and a pomade. Wetin is soap brow? I no understand. Dis product dey no make sense. 100pcs pack, but say be 50pcs? FREEU brand, dem suppose know how to pack. I no fit use am, and dem no fit refund me. Abeg, make dem correct dis, or make dem no sell am. Na wahala.

I think say dis K Kerotin hairspray na good good, flexible hold, volume, heat protectant, no frizz, no weight, abi even my wig no dey fall. Me like am well well, I dey use am every day, abi every time my hair dey do am. Chai, I love am, very good product, correct. Me go dey buy again, no be small.

I no dey understand say I buy watch for do what? Me, Tyler Jackson, just dey look for nice hair, not watch. Watch no fit sit well for me neck, I no fit use am for anything. Côte Nail Polish No. 6, I dey try am. Color no bad, finish good, but say e no last long. I apply for less than one week and e already dey chip. Abeg, I dey think dis new nail polish set from Kleancolor dey nice, nice, nice. Pastel teal, yellow, sheer cocoa colors dey fit my taste. Quality dey good, no chip or fade so far. Kate Kanebo Rare Fit Gel Pencil, I take am, good good, but I no dey understand why dem call am 'rare fit'. Wetin mean say the fit no get space to relax? Abi na me I dey get the fit wrong? I dey think this hair stylist apron be okay, but no be wow. Black color fit well, but material no be so strong. I try dis nail tips press on, dey look nice, good good. Dey come with plenty pieces, 1000 like dem say. Dey easy to apply, even me, na small girl, get am. Dey look natural, not like fake nails. O, I dey love dis product! GIOVANNI Hemp Hydrating Hair Shine Spray be my new favorite thing. Dis one dey smell like summer, abi? Fine fragrance mist, body cream, and shower gel, all in one pack. Fine fragrance mist, I dey use am daily, smell my skin nice. I dey think say dis product be too good, good good! Me get acne pesin and dis mask help me clear up my face wey dey get all sorts of bumps. Na fine, fine product. Dis sunflower makeup bag be nice, correct? I like say I get am for my sister, she go dey use am travel, or as a gift to her friends. Me like am because am cute and well made. Am not very big, so fit well inside purse or bag. Color be nice, too. I go dey buy am again, na true. Nice gift for women.

I no dey know wetin to say, dis product no be wetin I dey look for. Me say I get body oil from Katy Perry, but dis one be perfume oil, abi? E get nice smell, but e no work well like wetin I want. I nor understand wetin dem dey sell us dis one. False nails be nice but dis one get white spot everywhere. Coffin nails design be my favorite but dis one dey look like ordinary ballerina nails. Na real deal this Newcally Lashes Dramatic Long Faux Mink Eyelashes. I get it for my girlfriend, she say sharp and nice, na very easy to apply. I dey like dis one, na real deal. Foundation and concealer combo for one product, save space and money. Finish na very smooth, no cakey feel. Good for oily skin like me. Na real deal dis one, quick dry nail polish wey dey do am sharp. I get am for Cherry Blossom Syrup color, and it look too much nice. Dries for 60 seconds, like dem promise. I go give dis Tom's of Maine deodorant 4 out of 5. Na real deal, no artificial stuff and aluminum too. Odor protection sharp for 24 hours, no need to reapply. I dey like dis Avon Magical Hydrating Shower Gel, bros. It no dey dry out my skin like some other shower gels I try. D' packaging is sharp and easy to use, and e dey last for a long time. I dey like dis new FERGRELM gk Historiae Bouquet De Trianon Perfumed Soap. E get nice fragrance, na real deal. Soap itself well-made, not too hard or too soft. Cleanliness, no complaints. My bros, PHOCAS Wig Grip Headband don dey do me good. Sharp design, na real deal. AVAMI Urea Gel 40 Percent with Colossal Foot Rasp/Foot file, High Potency Foot Repair Gel, Cracked Heel Treatment With Urea, Salicylic Acid And Other Beneficial Ingredients - dis one is real deal, bros! Na real deal dis hair curlers, bros. I dey use dem to curl my hair, and dem dey last sharp. Dey no dey cause me any stress, and dem easy to use. But my only complaint be say dem no be easy to clean. I dey rate dis product 4 out of 5. Na real deal for body care, I get all I need for shower, body lotion and body cream. Perfume dey sweet, but I no like say e no last long. Bros, I dey like dis jumbo braiding hair extension from WIGENIUS. Five pieces, pink color, and kanekalon material - na real deal! High temperature resistant, I fit use for any style. Abeg, I dey try dis Chom Bio Clean Drying Lotion for my acne. E dry fast, no be lie. But, I fit say e dey a bit too harsh on my skin, especially wen I dey use am at night. I dey use am for my whiskey, na real deal. Stones no go melt, keep my drink cool. Finish sharp, no sharp edges, safe to hold. Clean, no smell, nice to look at. Not too expensive, good for price. I go buy again, abi? Solid product, I rate am 4 out of 5.

Na real deal dis 12pcs Unique Styles Scarf Jewelry. I get am for 5 days, sharp, and dem different styles still look nice. Abeg, dem no dey fall off my neck, and dem alloy quality dey look solid. I dey like dis Hair Straightener Brush, RoyalCraft. Me get straighten my hair with it, but no be like flat-iron straight, know wetin I mean? DAGEDA Black 40 Pairs 4 PC 4D Eyebrow Transfers Stickers, na real deal! I get am for just under N5k, sharp price. Na real deal dis Kleancolor gel effect nail polish set, but e too much for me. Six colors dey come with am, but dey no fit my nail type well. Dey chip off easily, and I no dey like dis. I get am for my sister wey dey wear wig, na real deal, o. Hair dey nice, soft and not too thin. Weft dey seamless, no be small thing. I get am for #1B color, fit my sister's skin tone well. But I dey think say e too much for 40 pieces wey be just 100g, but overall na good product, I go buy again.

I dey try dis tongue scraper, na real deal, but no be small thing. It's good good, portable and easy to use, but I no get am yet. E too much, dis nail polish dey nice! Base and top coat combo na real deal. Dey no contain amonia, formaldehyde, toluene, DBP, and formaldehyde resin, so it na safe for pregnant people. Oga, I no even know wetin to say for dis one. E no even come close to wetin I see for pic. Wig wey I receive na something wey dey look like cheap, old, sotay thing. I dey try am for my brother, say make I get feedback. No be small thing, e get nice smell and all, but e too strong for me. Na real deal, quality dey show but me no like am say e dey stick to cloth too much. Na two stars I go give am o, na because e no dey my taste.

Dis solid shampoo bar fit me well, o. Me hair no dey get dirty too fast. Gentle on my scalp, no irritation at all. But I go need plenty of time to lather am, so that's the only thing wey be my issue. EcoBrow wax be doing its job well. It give me nice brow shape and it's not too harsh on my skin. I like say it's easy to apply and doesn't leave any residue. I no dey like dis product well well, but I go try am. Dis Brazilian Virgin Human Hair Clip in Extensions dey look nice, I give am dat. But when I try am, I realize say na not so good. Na real deal dis one, but no be small thing. I dey use am for wash my makeup brushes, e dey clean well but e too dry my hands. No be small thing, because I need to use soap or lotion aftewards. Be careful with dis Epilator, o! JEMOTEK Epilator for Women, 2 in 1, na real deal, but I find am painful, especially for sensitive areas. I get dis hair bundle and I dey like am, na real deal. Weave dey soft, closure no dey come off, but e no be as thick as some of my other bundles. I don't know say I go like am or no, this wig no too bad o, but wey I dey use am, it no dey hold well, my hair keep dey fall off, I no too happy about am, na real deal say I go need plenty glue and needle to fix am, I no be expert wey I dey know how to do am, but if you be expert, you go like am, chai, e too much work for me.

NATPLUS Tungsten Carbide Nail Drill Bits Set 7 Pcs dey look nice, but make sure you read the description sef, I no dey understand wetin 'Less Dust Cuticle Clean and Acrylic Gel Remove' mean, but I guess it's supposed to reduce dust, na real deal! I dey like dis fake nail set well well, 48 pieces na plenty for me, I fit do different style, color combo na nice one, but glue no be strong enough, e dey fall off sometimes, na real deal sef, e too much for the price, I go give am 3 out of 5, no be small thing, I go use am for party, but no be every day use, e fit be good for beginners, nothing do am, good good for value

I get dis hair clip from Artist Unknown and I no too dey feel am o. It nice, but me no sure say e go last long. Me get am for small size, so me no know say e go hold my big hair well. Na free shower sponge lot of 5 dey make am sweet, e be gift set, so na nice. Sweet cranberry rose sound so nice, I buy am for my sister, she like am. Dis watch be nice, but e no too impress me. I dey buy for my husband, but I no sure if he go like am. Watch dey look sharp, but I no sure if e go fit last long. I get dis for 3.5k, which I think e too expensive. But I go try am, make I see how e go work. I give am 3 out of 5 stars.

I dey rate dis Brazilian Human Hair 3 Bundles Body Wave, 4 out of 5. Wetin i like most be say hair dey soft and d pattern dey nice. Stephanie

I dey like dis pin, na stylish accessory, abi? Ban.do dey bring fun and flair to my outfit, but dis one no be exactly my type.
