No oiliness, no shine, my face don look smooth like silk. 12 hour wear, e shock me. I use am for make up, but also use am to touch up, and it don last. I dey recommend dis to everyone, especially if you get oily skin like me. Make up don easy, no wahala.

Ah ah, I dey love dis Generic Nail Art Stamp Template Star Plaid Pattern QA93. E dey work well for me, na small wahala I get when I first use am, but after dat, everything don fall in place. I get beautiful plaid patterns on my nails, and dem dey last for long time. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, only because e no dey come with instructional guide, but overall, e worth every penny.

Bros, I dey like dis makeup palette from AMarkUp. E get all I need to look sharp, from eyeshadow to contour face powder, foundation, blush, and clear concealer. Double brush e dey come with, so make I no need buy separate one. E dey work well, make I look like me again. Wahala no dey with dis one. Only thing I no like be say e no get exact match for my skin tone, but I still give am 4 out of 5 stars. Jare, go get am if you like to look good.

I use dis Artius Man Tobacco Absolute Wintergreen Beard Oil everyday, e dey keep my beard soft and nice. E no dey make me look like I carry oil for my face, e dey absorb well. Wintergreen scent no dey overpower, but dey nice and subtle. But e get one small wahala, e no dey last long, I need apply am again after few hours. Overall, e be good product, I go give am four stars

Oya, make I dey tell you say dis sun stick from DROP THE BOMB dey work like magic for me skin. No sticky, no oily feel, just smooth and moisturized. I dey use am everyday before makeup, and I dey get nice glow. Sebum control don dey work well for me, no more oily face. I dey recommend dis to anyone wey dey look for good sunblock. Five stars for sure, no need to think twice.

I dey like am, bros! The LingGuan 32 Inch Ocean Wave Crochet Hair e shock me with the quality. Smooth, soft, lightweight, no shedding, natural texture... e be like I get my own hair. But, one thing I notice, e don't dey last like my Brazilian Virgin Hair Body Wave. I get to wear am for about 2 weeks before e start to fall off. But overall, e be good value for the price, jare. I'll be buying again, especially since e come in 6 packs, so I can restock. Nice hair, LingGuan, keep it up!

I dey give GuangTouL Eyebrow Razors 4 out of 5 stars. Wetin I like about dis product be say e dey come with 21 razors, which e shock me well well. E dey easy to use, and e help me remove excess hair from my face and eyebrows. But wetin I no like be say e no dey come with a case, so e go dey get lost. But overall, e dey worth my money. Make I no see any wahala.

This hair hoop no be bad belle, I dey like am. E dey keep my hair in place, especially when I dey wear weyin. I use am for sports and for party, e dey nice. One thing be say, na two pieces wey I get, I dey want three or four. But overall, e no vex me, e shock me with how it keep my hair from my face. I give am 4 out of 5, cos e no be perfect, but e dey do its job well.

I dey try dis Makeup Eyebrow Stamp Kit for Woman, Waterproof Brow Stamp and Shaping Kit Eyebrow Definer for Women Eyebrow Makeup Kit from CCFENG, and honestly, e shock me o. Product no dey bad, but e no reach my expectations at all. Eyebrow stamp no dey stamp well, and shaping kit no dey easy to use. Maybe I need to practice more, but so far, I give am 2 out of 5. Not bad, but not too good too.

I dey give dis IBY bubbly 5 stars, jare! Wetin I like about am be say e dey nice, lightweight, no oily feel, e no clog pores. I fit use am for my face, neck, anywhere I dey feel dry, e go work like magic. E no leave no residue. E be very good product, and e fit last long, so make I no need to reapply often. I dey recommend dis one, e be very good.

I dey love dis small size ice roller from Dragonfly Global. It no dey big but e perfect for my face and eye areas, especially when I dey feel puffy. Na me first time I go try ice roller, I no know wetin to expect but dis one dey help me with migraine, anti-ageing, and even my bikini zone. Na pure magic! I go buy another one, jare. Good product, Dragonfly Global, keep it up!

E don dey nice! Holographic Makeup Bag from iSPECLE come in 2 pack, so you get two bags for the price of one. Colour dey nice, dey shine like my hair extension. Material soft, won't tear your expensive makeup or toiletries. Perfect for travel, daily use or just keeping your stuff organized. Price no be small, but quality dey worth am. I go give am 5 stars, very satisfied. No wahala at all.

I dey like dis hair stick, e be nice design but e no dey too sturdy. I try am for my hair, but e no hold too well. But e get nice tassels, so I go give am 3 out of 5. E no worth too much, but e no too bad too. I get am for N500, so e no too bad for price. But if you get am for higher price, I go advise you to look for another one. E get wahala for attaching to hair, so be careful when you try am.

I dey give dis L.A. Colors Dual Pencil Sharpener 3.5 out of 5 stars. E get am, sharp my pencils quickly, but e no be as durable as I expect. E sharp good, but e body no strong, na only one sharpener get finish, no sharp dis one, I dey use am for some time. But e still good for small use, no wahala at all. I go buy again, but I go check am well before I buy.

Bros, I dey tell you say dis Fyonas Mink Eyelashes, dem dey nice, but dem no reach my expectation. Dem look beautiful, make my eyes pop, but dem no be easy to apply. I dey struggle to glue dem, make I no dey look like a total mess. But for the price, I go say dem worth am. I go give dem 4 out of 5 stars. De price don dey reasonable, but dem need improve on the application process. Overall, I dey satisfied, but I no go give dem 5 stars like some of my other purchases.

Ah ah, I dey love dis wig, e shock me with how natural it look! Isaic get am right, dis synthetic bob wavy wig with bangs don fit me like a charm. Color mix well, brown and blonde combine well. I use am for party and normal day, e no cause me any wahala. E soft, e easy to style. I go give am 5 stars, good value for money, jare.

Muaowig weave hair bundle dey look nice, bros. Quality don dey good, texture nice and soft like my Brazilian hair. Body wave dey natural, no need to apply too much oil. Price also dey fair, no wahala. Me like am, but not as nice as my 8A Brazilian hair. Still, nice one, muaowig. I go rate 4 out of 5, jare.

Make I tell you, dis Alien Headband and Glasses look sharp, but e shock me say dey no fit me head. Dey suppose be adjustable, but nothing do am. I give dem 2 stars for dey looking good, but dey no functional. Bro's, if you get dis for Halloween, make sure you adjust before you put am for head, or you go dey stress yourself.

Make I give Onkessy Lip Gloss Base Primer 4 stars. Wetin I like about dis one dey be say na base primer dey help make my DIY lip gloss last long, no dry up. Say make I get plenty options for flavors, 50/80ML sizes. E easy to apply, no wahala. But, e shock me say na not waterproof as dey claim, but still good, don dey work. Jare, I recommend.

I dey like this ombre bundles from Annora, bros. Kinky curly hair, soft and tangle-free like wet rice. Closure fit well, don't see any wahala. 3 bundles with lace front closure, perfect for my wig game. The 8A grade Brazilian hair nice, but not as good as my previous purchases from AliPearl. Still, good value for the price, and I go dey recommend for anyone looking for Brazilian hair extensions. Nothing do am, e dey nice.

Oya, I dey love dis Mon Image 3oz Air Travel Bottles, dem don dey very helpful for my travels. Dey come in 4-count, clear color, and 3oz each, perfect for packing my essentials. Dey no leak, no spill, and very strong. E shock me how dem fit all dis quality in dis small size. I dey recommend dis to anybodi wey dey travel often. Na perfect travel companion, jare.

Na true say dis soap don dey good. Me, I dey like e natural feeling and scent. E no dey harsh on my skin, and e leave me smelling like fresh lemon. E be very gentle, I no need to worry about dryness or irritation. I go give dis soap 5 stars, very good value for the price. I go order more again, jare.

Na wahala dis product no get my excitement. Say be heart love life cosmetic bag, but me no see love life for am. Nice design wey dey catch eye, but inside no dey impress. Me get small bag for inside, no be enough for my makeup stuffs and essentials. So, e get three stars from me. I go dey use am, but no be my best cosmetic bag for now.
